authors_text: Chong Xiang,Alexander Valtchanov,Saeed Mahloujifar,Prateek Mittal
title: ObjectSeeker: Certifiably Robust Object Detection against Patch Hiding Attacks via Patch-agnostic Masking
title_zh: ObjectSeeker：通过与补丁无关的掩蔽来抵御补丁隐藏攻击的可靠对象检测
comment: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy 2023; extended version
comments: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy 2023; extended version
abstract: Object detectors, which are widely deployed in security-critical systems such as autonomous vehicles, have been found vulnerable to patch hiding attacks. An attacker can use a single physically-realizable adversarial patch to make the object detector miss the detection of victim objects and undermine the functionality of object detection applications. In this paper, we propose ObjectSeeker for certifiably robust object detection against patch hiding attacks. The key insight in ObjectSeeker is patch-agnostic masking: we aim to mask out the entire adversarial patch without knowing the shape, size, and location of the patch. This masking operation neutralizes the adversarial effect and allows any vanilla object detector to safely detect objects on the masked images. Remarkably, we can evaluate ObjectSeeker's robustness in a certifiable manner: we develop a certification procedure to formally determine if ObjectSeeker can detect certain objects against any white-box adaptive attack within the threat model, achieving certifiable robustness. Our experiments demonstrate a significant (~10%-40% absolute and ~2-6x relative) improvement in certifiable robustness over the prior work, as well as high clean performance (~1% drop compared with undefended models).
summary: Object detectors, which are widely deployed in security-critical systems such as autonomous vehicles, have been found vulnerable to patch hiding attacks. An attacker can use a single physically-realizable adversarial patch to make the object detector miss the detection of victim objects and undermine the functionality of object detection applications. In this paper, we propose ObjectSeeker for certifiably robust object detection against patch hiding attacks. The key insight in ObjectSeeker is patch-agnostic masking: we aim to mask out the entire adversarial patch without knowing the shape, size, and location of the patch. This masking operation neutralizes the adversarial effect and allows any vanilla object detector to safely detect objects on the masked images. Remarkably, we can evaluate ObjectSeeker's robustness in a certifiable manner: we develop a certification procedure to formally determine if ObjectSeeker can detect certain objects against any white-box adaptive attack within the threat model, achieving certifiable robustness. Our experiments demonstrate a significant (~10%-40% absolute and ~2-6x relative) improvement in certifiable robustness over the prior work, as well as high clean performance (~1% drop compared with undefended models).
abstract_zh: 广泛部署在自动驾驶汽车等安全关键系统中的物体检测器被发现容易受到补丁隐藏攻击。攻击者可以使用单个物理上可实现的对抗性补丁来使对象检测器错过对受害者对象的检测并破坏对象检测应用程序的功能。在本文中，我们提出了 ObjectSeeker，用于针对补丁隐藏攻击的可证明稳健的对象检测。 ObjectSeeker 的关键见解是与补丁无关的屏蔽：我们的目标是在不知道补丁的形状、大小和位置的情况下屏蔽整个对抗性补丁。这种掩蔽操作可以中和对抗效应，并允许任何普通对象检测器安全地检测掩蔽图像上的对象。值得注意的是，我们可以以可认证的方式评估 ObjectSeeker 的稳健性：我们开发了一个认证程序来正式确定 ObjectSeeker 是否可以检测到威胁模型中任何白盒自适应攻击的某些对象，从而实现可认证的稳健性。我们的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，可证明的鲁棒性有了显着的改进（绝对值约 10%-40%，相对值约 2-6 倍），并且具有高清洁性能（与无防护模型相比下降约 1%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ObjectSeeker方法，通过无感知遮罩技术实现对贴片隐藏攻击的可验证鲁棒目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测系统在安全关键场景（如自动驾驶）中易受贴片隐藏攻击，攻击者可通过物理可实现的对抗贴片使检测失效，亟需提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出无感知遮罩机制，在未知对抗贴片形状、尺寸和位置的情况下，通过遮罩操作消除其影响，并开发形式化验证方法评估可验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验显示ObjectSeeker在可验证鲁棒性指标上较先前工作提升10%-40%绝对值（2-6倍相对提升），且干净样本性能仅下降约1%。
AI.conclusion: ObjectSeeker通过无感知遮罩与形式化验证有效抵御贴片隐藏攻击，在保持检测性能的同时实现了可验证的鲁棒性保障。

authors_text: Raphael Sulzer,Loic Landrieu,Alexandre Boulch,Renaud Marlet,Bruno Vallet
title: Deep Surface Reconstruction from Point Clouds with Visibility Information
title_zh: 具有可见性信息的点云深层表面重建
abstract: Most current neural networks for reconstructing surfaces from point clouds ignore sensor poses and only operate on raw point locations. Sensor visibility, however, holds meaningful information regarding space occupancy and surface orientation. In this paper, we present two simple ways to augment raw point clouds with visibility information, so it can directly be leveraged by surface reconstruction networks with minimal adaptation. Our proposed modifications consistently improve the accuracy of generated surfaces as well as the generalization ability of the networks to unseen shape domains. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/raphaelsulzer/dsrv-data.
summary: Most current neural networks for reconstructing surfaces from point clouds ignore sensor poses and only operate on raw point locations. Sensor visibility, however, holds meaningful information regarding space occupancy and surface orientation. In this paper, we present two simple ways to augment raw point clouds with visibility information, so it can directly be leveraged by surface reconstruction networks with minimal adaptation. Our proposed modifications consistently improve the accuracy of generated surfaces as well as the generalization ability of the networks to unseen shape domains. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/raphaelsulzer/dsrv-data.
abstract_zh: 当前大多数用于从点云重建表面的神经网络都会忽略传感器姿势，并且仅在原始点位置上运行。然而，传感器可见性包含有关空间占用和表面方向的有意义的信息。在本文中，我们提出了两种简单的方法来利用可见性信息来增强原始点云，因此它可以直接被表面重建网络以最小的适应性利用。我们提出的修改不断提高生成表面的准确性以及网络对看不见的形状域的泛化能力。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/raphaelsulzer/dsrv-data 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用可见性信息增强点云数据，以提升深度神经网络在表面重建任务中的精度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有表面重建网络仅依赖原始点位置，忽略传感器姿态和可见性信息，导致空间占用和表面方向信息利用不足，限制了重建精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过两种简单方法将可见性信息融入原始点云数据，使表面重建网络无需复杂调整即可直接利用该信息进行学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法显著提升了表面重建精度，并增强了网络对新形状域的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了可见性信息在表面重建中的有效性，开源代码与数据为后续研究提供了支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用可见性信息增强点云数据，以提升深度神经网络在表面重建任务中的精度和泛化能力。

authors_text: Tingting Liu,Salvatore Giorgi,Xiangyu Tao,Sharath Chandra Guntuku,Douglas Bellew,Brenda Curtis,Lyle Ungar
title: Different Affordances on Facebook and SMS Text Messaging Do Not Impede Generalization of Language-Based Predictive Models
title_zh: Facebook 和 SMS 短信的不同功能并不妨碍基于语言的预测模型的推广
comment: Accepted to the 17th International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM), 2023
comments: Accepted to the 17th International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM), 2023
abstract: Adaptive mobile device-based health interventions often use machine learning models trained on non-mobile device data, such as social media text, due to the difficulty and high expense of collecting large text message (SMS) data. Therefore, understanding the differences and generalization of models between these platforms is crucial for proper deployment. We examined the psycho-linguistic differences between Facebook and text messages, and their impact on out-of-domain model performance, using a sample of 120 users who shared both. We found that users use Facebook for sharing experiences (e.g., leisure) and SMS for task-oriented and conversational purposes (e.g., plan confirmations), reflecting the differences in the affordances. To examine the downstream effects of these differences, we used pre-trained Facebook-based language models to estimate age, gender, depression, life satisfaction, and stress on both Facebook and SMS. We found no significant differences in correlations between the estimates and self-reports across 6 of 8 models. These results suggest using pre-trained Facebook language models to achieve better accuracy with just-in-time interventions.
summary: Adaptive mobile device-based health interventions often use machine learning models trained on non-mobile device data, such as social media text, due to the difficulty and high expense of collecting large text message (SMS) data. Therefore, understanding the differences and generalization of models between these platforms is crucial for proper deployment. We examined the psycho-linguistic differences between Facebook and text messages, and their impact on out-of-domain model performance, using a sample of 120 users who shared both. We found that users use Facebook for sharing experiences (e.g., leisure) and SMS for task-oriented and conversational purposes (e.g., plan confirmations), reflecting the differences in the affordances. To examine the downstream effects of these differences, we used pre-trained Facebook-based language models to estimate age, gender, depression, life satisfaction, and stress on both Facebook and SMS. We found no significant differences in correlations between the estimates and self-reports across 6 of 8 models. These results suggest using pre-trained Facebook language models to achieve better accuracy with just-in-time interventions.
abstract_zh: 由于收集大量短信 (SMS) 数据的难度和高昂费用，基于移动设备的自适应健康干预措施通常使用在非移动设备数据（例如社交媒体文本）上训练的机器学习模型。因此，了解这些平台之间模型的差异和通用性对于正确部署至关重要。我们使用共享这两种信息的 120 名用户作为样本，研究了 Facebook 和短信之间的心理语言差异及其对域外模型性能的影响。我们发现，用户使用 Facebook 来分享体验（例如休闲），使用 SMS 来实现任务导向和对话目的（例如计划确认），这反映了可供性的差异。为了研究这些差异的下游影响，我们使用基于 Facebook 的预训练语言模型来估计 Facebook 和 SMS 上的年龄、性别、抑郁症、生活满意度和压力。我们发现 8 个模型中的 6 个模型的估计值与自我报告之间的相关性没有显着差异。这些结果表明，使用预先训练的 Facebook 语言模型可以通过及时干预获得更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 研究比较了基于Facebook和短信（SMS）文本的语言模型在健康干预中的泛化能力，发现两者差异不影响模型性能。
AI.motivation: 移动健康干预常使用非移动设备数据（如社交媒体文本）训练模型，因短信数据收集成本高。需明确不同平台数据差异对模型泛化的影响。
AI.method: 分析120名用户的Facebook与短信文本的语用差异，利用预训练Facebook语言模型在两种平台上估计年龄、性别、抑郁等指标，并对比预测结果与自述报告的相关性。
AI.result: 6个模型在Facebook和短信上的预测相关性无显著差异，表明Facebook模型可有效泛化至短信数据。
AI.conclusion: 预训练Facebook语言模型可用于短信即时健康干预，无需额外训练，提升效率。

ai_content.tldr: 研究比较了基于Facebook和短信（SMS）文本的语言模型在健康干预中的泛化能力，发现两者差异不影响模型性能。
ai_content.motivation: 移动健康干预常使用非移动设备数据（如社交媒体文本）训练模型，因短信数据收集成本高。需明确不同平台数据差异对模型泛化的影响。
ai_content.method: 分析120名用户的Facebook与短信文本的语用差异，利用预训练Facebook语言模型在两种平台上估计年龄、性别、抑郁等指标，并对比预测结果与自述报告的相关性。
ai_content.result: 6个模型在Facebook和短信上的预测相关性无显著差异，表明Facebook模型可有效泛化至短信数据。
ai_content.conclusion: 预训练Facebook语言模型可用于短信即时健康干预，无需额外训练，提升效率。

search_text: Different Affordances on Facebook and SMS Text Messaging Do Not Impede Generalization of Language-Based Predictive Models Facebook 和 SMS 短信的不同功能并不妨碍基于语言的预测模型的推广 Adaptive mobile device-based health interventions often use machine learning models trained on non-mobile device data, such as social media text, due to the difficulty and high expense of collecting large text message (SMS) data. Therefore, understanding the differences and generalization of models between these platforms is crucial for proper deployment. We examined the psycho-linguistic differences between Facebook and text messages, and their impact on out-of-domain model performance, using a sample of 120 users who shared both. We found that users use Facebook for sharing experiences (e.g., leisure) and SMS for task-oriented and conversational purposes (e.g., plan confirmations), reflecting the differences in the affordances. To examine the downstream effects of these differences, we used pre-trained Facebook-based language models to estimate age, gender, depression, life satisfaction, and stress on both Facebook and SMS. We found no significant differences in correlations between the estimates and self-reports across 6 of 8 models. These results suggest using pre-trained Facebook language models to achieve better accuracy with just-in-time interventions. 由于收集大量短信 (SMS) 数据的难度和高昂费用，基于移动设备的自适应健康干预措施通常使用在非移动设备数据（例如社交媒体文本）上训练的机器学习模型。因此，了解这些平台之间模型的差异和通用性对于正确部署至关重要。我们使用共享这两种信息的 120 名用户作为样本，研究了 Facebook 和短信之间的心理语言差异及其对域外模型性能的影响。我们发现，用户使用 Facebook 来分享体验（例如休闲），使用 SMS 来实现任务导向和对话目的（例如计划确认），这反映了可供性的差异。为了研究这些差异的下游影响，我们使用基于 Facebook 的预训练语言模型来估计 Facebook 和 SMS 上的年龄、性别、抑郁症、生活满意度和压力。我们发现 8 个模型中的 6 个模型的估计值与自我报告之间的相关性没有显着差异。这些结果表明，使用预先训练的 Facebook 语言模型可以通过及时干预获得更高的准确性。 研究比较了基于Facebook和短信（SMS）文本的语言模型在健康干预中的泛化能力，发现两者差异不影响模型性能。 Tingting Liu,Salvatore Giorgi,Xiangyu Tao,Sharath Chandra Guntuku,Douglas Bellew,Brenda Curtis,Lyle Ungar cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Wo Jae Lee,Karim Helwani,Arvindh Krishnaswamy,Srikanth Tenneti
title: Robust Audio Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 强大的音频异常检测
abstract: We propose an outlier robust multivariate time series model which can be used for detecting previously unseen anomalous sounds based on noisy training data. The presented approach doesn't assume the presence of labeled anomalies in the training dataset and uses a novel deep neural network architecture to learn the temporal dynamics of the multivariate time series at multiple resolutions while being robust to contaminations in the training dataset. The temporal dynamics are modeled using recurrent layers augmented with attention mechanism. These recurrent layers are built on top of convolutional layers allowing the network to extract features at multiple resolutions. The output of the network is an outlier robust probability density function modeling the conditional probability of future samples given the time series history. State-of-the-art approaches using other multiresolution architectures are contrasted with our proposed approach. We validate our solution using publicly available machine sound datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in anomaly detection by comparing against several state-of-the-art models.
summary: We propose an outlier robust multivariate time series model which can be used for detecting previously unseen anomalous sounds based on noisy training data. The presented approach doesn't assume the presence of labeled anomalies in the training dataset and uses a novel deep neural network architecture to learn the temporal dynamics of the multivariate time series at multiple resolutions while being robust to contaminations in the training dataset. The temporal dynamics are modeled using recurrent layers augmented with attention mechanism. These recurrent layers are built on top of convolutional layers allowing the network to extract features at multiple resolutions. The output of the network is an outlier robust probability density function modeling the conditional probability of future samples given the time series history. State-of-the-art approaches using other multiresolution architectures are contrasted with our proposed approach. We validate our solution using publicly available machine sound datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in anomaly detection by comparing against several state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种异常稳健的多元时间序列模型，可用于基于噪声训练数据检测以前未见过的异常​​声音。所提出的方法不假设训练数据集中存在标记异常，并使用新颖的深度神经网络架构来学习多种分辨率下多元时间序列的时间动态，同时对训练数据集中的污染具有鲁棒性。使用通过注意机制增强的循环层对时间动态进行建模。这些循环层构建在卷积层之上，允许网络以多种分辨率提取特征。网络的输出是一个异常稳健的概率密度函数，对给定时间序列历史的未来样本的条件概率进行建模。使用其他多分辨率架构的最先进方法与我们提出的方法进行了对比。我们使用公开的机器声音数据集验证我们的解决方案。我们通过与几种最先进的模型进行比较来证明我们的方法在异常检测方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标记异常数据的鲁棒音频异常检测模型，通过多分辨率时间序列分析和注意力机制应对噪声训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标记异常数据或对噪声敏感，而实际场景中异常数据常未标记且训练数据易受噪声污染。
AI.method: 构建卷积层与注意力增强的循环网络，提取多尺度时序特征并生成鲁棒的概率密度函数，无需异常标签即可建模条件概率。
AI.result: 在公开机器声音数据集上验证，相较其他多分辨率架构方法，异常检测效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无监督场景下有效检测未知异常，适用于实际噪声环境中的音频监控任务。

authors_text: Nadezhda Koriakina,Nataša Sladoje,Vladimir Bašić,Joakim Lindblad
title: Oral cancer detection and interpretation: Deep multiple instance learning versus conventional deep single instance learning
title_zh: 口腔癌检测和解释：深度多实例学习与传统深度单实例学习
abstract: The current medical standard for setting an oral cancer (OC) diagnosis is histological examination of a tissue sample from the oral cavity. This process is time consuming and more invasive than an alternative approach of acquiring a brush sample followed by cytological analysis. Skilled cytotechnologists are able to detect changes due to malignancy, however, to introduce this approach into clinical routine is associated with challenges such as a lack of experts and labour-intensive work. To design a trustworthy OC detection system that would assist cytotechnologists, we are interested in AI-based methods that reliably can detect cancer given only per-patient labels (minimizing annotation bias), and also provide information on which cells are most relevant for the diagnosis (enabling supervision and understanding). We, therefore, perform a comparison of a conventional single instance learning (SIL) approach and a modern multiple instance learning (MIL) method suitable for OC detection and interpretation, utilizing three different neural network architectures. To facilitate systematic evaluation of the considered approaches, we introduce a synthetic PAP-QMNIST dataset, that serves as a model of OC data, while offering access to per-instance ground truth. Our study indicates that on PAP-QMNIST, the SIL performs better, on average, than the MIL approach. Performance at the bag level on real-world cytological data is similar for both methods, yet the single instance approach performs better on average. Visual examination by cytotechnologist indicates that the methods manage to identify cells which deviate from normality, including malignant cells as well as those suspicious for dysplasia. We share the code as open source at https://github.com/MIDA-group/OralCancerMILvsSIL
summary: The current medical standard for setting an oral cancer (OC) diagnosis is histological examination of a tissue sample from the oral cavity. This process is time consuming and more invasive than an alternative approach of acquiring a brush sample followed by cytological analysis. Skilled cytotechnologists are able to detect changes due to malignancy, however, to introduce this approach into clinical routine is associated with challenges such as a lack of experts and labour-intensive work. To design a trustworthy OC detection system that would assist cytotechnologists, we are interested in AI-based methods that reliably can detect cancer given only per-patient labels (minimizing annotation bias), and also provide information on which cells are most relevant for the diagnosis (enabling supervision and understanding). We, therefore, perform a comparison of a conventional single instance learning (SIL) approach and a modern multiple instance learning (MIL) method suitable for OC detection and interpretation, utilizing three different neural network architectures. To facilitate systematic evaluation of the considered approaches, we introduce a synthetic PAP-QMNIST dataset, that serves as a model of OC data, while offering access to per-instance ground truth. Our study indicates that on PAP-QMNIST, the SIL performs better, on average, than the MIL approach. Performance at the bag level on real-world cytological data is similar for both methods, yet the single instance approach performs better on average. Visual examination by cytotechnologist indicates that the methods manage to identify cells which deviate from normality, including malignant cells as well as those suspicious for dysplasia. We share the code as open source at https://github.com/MIDA-group/OralCancerMILvsSIL
abstract_zh: 目前口腔癌 (OC) 诊断的医学标准是对口腔组织样本进行组织学检查。与获取刷子样本然后进行细胞学分析的替代方法相比，这个过程非常耗时且更具侵入性。熟练的细胞技术人员能够检测出恶性肿瘤引起的变化，然而，将这种方法引入临床常规会面临诸如缺乏专家和劳动密集型工作等挑战。为了设计一个可以帮助细胞技术专家的值得信赖的 OC 检测系统，我们对基于人工智能的方法感兴趣，这种方法可以仅根据每个患者的标签可靠地检测癌症（最大限度地减少注释偏差），并提供有关哪些细胞与诊断最相关的信息（实现监督和理解）。因此，我们利用三种不同的神经网络架构，对传统的单实例学习 (SIL) 方法和适合 OC 检测和解释的现代多实例学习 (MIL) 方法进行了比较。为了促进对所考虑方法的系统评估，我们引入了一个合成的 PAP-QMNIST 数据集，它充当 OC 数据的模型，同时提供对每个实例的基本事实的访问。我们的研究表明，在 PAP-QMNIST 上，SIL 的平均表现优于 MIL 方法。两种方法在实际细胞学数据上的袋级别性能相似，但单实例方法平均性能更好。细胞技术专家的目视检查表明，这些方法能够识别偏离正常的细胞，包括恶性细胞以及可疑发育不良的细胞。我们在 https://github.com/MIDA-group/OralCancerMILvsSIL 上以开源方式共享代码

AI.tldr: 本文比较了单实例学习（SIL）和多实例学习（MIL）方法在口腔癌检测中的性能，旨在开发一种可靠的人工智能系统辅助细胞技术员进行诊断。
AI.motivation: 当前口腔癌的诊断依赖于组织样本的组织学检查，过程耗时且侵入性较强。相比之下，通过刷取样本进行细胞学分析更为便捷，但缺乏专家和劳动密集型工作是该方法在临床推广中的主要挑战。因此，本文旨在设计一种基于人工智能的检测系统，以辅助细胞技术员进行诊断。
AI.method: 本文比较了传统单实例学习（SIL）方法与现代多实例学习（MIL）方法，使用三种不同的神经网络架构进行口腔癌检测与解释。为了系统评估这些方法，引入了一个合成的PAP-QMNIST数据集，该数据集模拟了口腔癌数据并提供实例级别的真实标签。
AI.result: 在PAP-QMNIST数据集上，单实例学习方法的平均性能优于多实例学习方法。在实际细胞学数据上的袋级性能两者相似，但单实例方法平均表现更好。细胞技术员的视觉检查表明，这两种方法都能识别出偏离正常状态的细胞，包括恶性细胞和疑似异型性细胞。
AI.conclusion: 本文的研究表明，在口腔癌检测中，单实例学习方法在合成和真实数据集上的平均性能优于多实例学习方法，同时两种方法均能有效识别异常细胞，为开发辅助诊断的人工智能系统提供了参考。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文的研究表明，在口腔癌检测中，单实例学习方法在合成和真实数据集上的平均性能优于多实例学习方法，同时两种方法均能有效识别异常细胞，为开发辅助诊断的人工智能系统提供了参考。

tldr: 本文比较了单实例学习（SIL）和多实例学习（MIL）方法在口腔癌检测中的性能，旨在开发一种可靠的人工智能系统辅助细胞技术员进行诊断。
motivation: 当前口腔癌的诊断依赖于组织样本的组织学检查，过程耗时且侵入性较强。相比之下，通过刷取样本进行细胞学分析更为便捷，但缺乏专家和劳动密集型工作是该方法在临床推广中的主要挑战。因此，本文旨在设计一种基于人工智能的检测系统，以辅助细胞技术员进行诊断。
method: 本文比较了传统单实例学习（SIL）方法与现代多实例学习（MIL）方法，使用三种不同的神经网络架构进行口腔癌检测与解释。为了系统评估这些方法，引入了一个合成的PAP-QMNIST数据集，该数据集模拟了口腔癌数据并提供实例级别的真实标签。
result: 在PAP-QMNIST数据集上，单实例学习方法的平均性能优于多实例学习方法。在实际细胞学数据上的袋级性能两者相似，但单实例方法平均表现更好。细胞技术员的视觉检查表明，这两种方法都能识别出偏离正常状态的细胞，包括恶性细胞和疑似异型性细胞。
conclusion: 本文的研究表明，在口腔癌检测中，单实例学习方法在合成和真实数据集上的平均性能优于多实例学习方法，同时两种方法均能有效识别异常细胞，为开发辅助诊断的人工智能系统提供了参考。
search_text: Oral cancer detection and interpretation: Deep multiple instance learning versus conventional deep single instance learning 口腔癌检测和解释：深度多实例学习与传统深度单实例学习 The current medical standard for setting an oral cancer (OC) diagnosis is histological examination of a tissue sample from the oral cavity. This process is time consuming and more invasive than an alternative approach of acquiring a brush sample followed by cytological analysis. Skilled cytotechnologists are able to detect changes due to malignancy, however, to introduce this approach into clinical routine is associated with challenges such as a lack of experts and labour-intensive work. To design a trustworthy OC detection system that would assist cytotechnologists, we are interested in AI-based methods that reliably can detect cancer given only per-patient labels (minimizing annotation bias), and also provide information on which cells are most relevant for the diagnosis (enabling supervision and understanding). We, therefore, perform a comparison of a conventional single instance learning (SIL) approach and a modern multiple instance learning (MIL) method suitable for OC detection and interpretation, utilizing three different neural network architectures. To facilitate systematic evaluation of the considered approaches, we introduce a synthetic PAP-QMNIST dataset, that serves as a model of OC data, while offering access to per-instance ground truth. Our study indicates that on PAP-QMNIST, the SIL performs better, on average, than the MIL approach. Performance at the bag level on real-world cytological data is similar for both methods, yet the single instance approach performs better on average. Visual examination by cytotechnologist indicates that the methods manage to identify cells which deviate from normality, including malignant cells as well as those suspicious for dysplasia. We share the code as open source at https://github.com/MIDA-group/OralCancerMILvsSIL 目前口腔癌 (OC) 诊断的医学标准是对口腔组织样本进行组织学检查。与获取刷子样本然后进行细胞学分析的替代方法相比，这个过程非常耗时且更具侵入性。熟练的细胞技术人员能够检测出恶性肿瘤引起的变化，然而，将这种方法引入临床常规会面临诸如缺乏专家和劳动密集型工作等挑战。为了设计一个可以帮助细胞技术专家的值得信赖的 OC 检测系统，我们对基于人工智能的方法感兴趣，这种方法可以仅根据每个患者的标签可靠地检测癌症（最大限度地减少注释偏差），并提供有关哪些细胞与诊断最相关的信息（实现监督和理解）。因此，我们利用三种不同的神经网络架构，对传统的单实例学习 (SIL) 方法和适合 OC 检测和解释的现代多实例学习 (MIL) 方法进行了比较。为了促进对所考虑方法的系统评估，我们引入了一个合成的 PAP-QMNIST 数据集，它充当 OC 数据的模型，同时提供对每个实例的基本事实的访问。我们的研究表明，在 PAP-QMNIST 上，SIL 的平均表现优于 MIL 方法。两种方法在实际细胞学数据上的袋级别性能相似，但单实例方法平均性能更好。细胞技术专家的目视检查表明，这些方法能够识别偏离正常的细胞，包括恶性细胞以及可疑发育不良的细胞。我们在 https://github.com/MIDA-group/OralCancerMILvsSIL 上以开源方式共享代码 本文比较了单实例学习（SIL）和多实例学习（MIL）方法在口腔癌检测中的性能，旨在开发一种可靠的人工智能系统辅助细胞技术员进行诊断。 Nadezhda Koriakina,Nataša Sladoje,Vladimir Bašić,Joakim Lindblad eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mingxing Li,Shenglong Zhou,Chang Chen,Yueyi Zhang,Dong Liu,Zhiwei Xiong
title: Retinal Vessel Segmentation with Pixel-wise Adaptive Filters
title_zh: 使用逐像素自适应滤波器进行视网膜血管分割
abstract: Accurate retinal vessel segmentation is challenging because of the complex texture of retinal vessels and low imaging contrast. Previous methods generally refine segmentation results by cascading multiple deep networks, which are time-consuming and inefficient. In this paper, we propose two novel methods to address these challenges. First, we devise a light-weight module, named multi-scale residual similarity gathering (MRSG), to generate pixel-wise adaptive filters (PA-Filters). Different from cascading multiple deep networks, only one PA-Filter layer can improve the segmentation results. Second, we introduce a response cue erasing (RCE) strategy to enhance the segmentation accuracy. Experimental results on the DRIVE, CHASE_DB1, and STARE datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods while maintaining a compact structure. Code is available at https://github.com/Limingxing00/Retinal-Vessel-Segmentation-ISBI20222.
summary: Accurate retinal vessel segmentation is challenging because of the complex texture of retinal vessels and low imaging contrast. Previous methods generally refine segmentation results by cascading multiple deep networks, which are time-consuming and inefficient. In this paper, we propose two novel methods to address these challenges. First, we devise a light-weight module, named multi-scale residual similarity gathering (MRSG), to generate pixel-wise adaptive filters (PA-Filters). Different from cascading multiple deep networks, only one PA-Filter layer can improve the segmentation results. Second, we introduce a response cue erasing (RCE) strategy to enhance the segmentation accuracy. Experimental results on the DRIVE, CHASE_DB1, and STARE datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods while maintaining a compact structure. Code is available at https://github.com/Limingxing00/Retinal-Vessel-Segmentation-ISBI20222.
abstract_zh: 由于视网膜血管纹理复杂且成像对比度低，准确的视网膜血管分割具有挑战性。以往的方法一般通过级联多个深度网络来细化分割结果，耗时且低效。在本文中，我们提出了两种新方法来应对这些挑战。首先，我们设计了一个轻量级模块，称为多尺度残差相似性收集（MRSG），以生成像素级自适应滤波器（PA-Filters）。与级联多个深度网络不同，仅一层 PA-Filter 层就可以改善分割结果。其次，我们引入响应线索擦除（RCE）策略来提高分割精度。 DRIVE、CHASE_DB1 和 STARE 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在保持紧凑结构的同时优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Limingxing00/Retinal-Vessel-Segmentation-ISBI20222 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素自适应滤波器的视网膜血管分割方法，旨在解决复杂纹理和低对比度带来的分割难题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过级联多个深度网络进行分割优化，但存在计算量大、效率低的问题，因此需要更高效且准确的分割方法。
AI.method: 提出多尺度残差相似性汇聚（MRSG）模块生成像素自适应滤波器（PA-Filters），并引入响应提示消除（RCE）策略，以提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在DRIVE、CHASE_DB1和STARE数据集上的实验表明，该方法在分割精度上优于现有先进方法，同时保持模型结构紧凑。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过轻量级模块和策略优化，在保持模型简洁性的同时提升了分割效果，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Cristina Bustos,Daniel Rhoads,Agata Lapedriza,Javier Borge-Holthoefer,Albert Solé-Ribalta
title: Predicting the impact of urban change in pedestrian and road safety
title_zh: 预测城市变化对行人和道路安全的影响
abstract: Increased interaction between and among pedestrians and vehicles in the crowded urban environments of today gives rise to a negative side-effect: a growth in traffic accidents, with pedestrians being the most vulnerable elements. Recent work has shown that Convolutional Neural Networks are able to accurately predict accident rates exploiting Street View imagery along urban roads. The promising results point to the plausibility of aided design of safe urban landscapes, for both pedestrians and vehicles. In this paper, by considering historical accident data and Street View images, we detail how to automatically predict the impact (increase or decrease) of urban interventions on accident incidence. The results are positive, rendering an accuracies ranging from 60 to 80%. We additionally provide an interpretability analysis to unveil which specific categories of urban features impact accident rates positively or negatively. Considering the transportation network substrates (sidewalk and road networks) and their demand, we integrate these results to a complex network framework, to estimate the effective impact of urban change on the safety of pedestrians and vehicles. Results show that public authorities may leverage on machine learning tools to prioritize targeted interventions, since our analysis show that limited improvement is obtained with current tools. Further, our findings have a wider application range such as the design of safe urban routes for pedestrians or to the field of driver-assistance technologies.

Recent work has shown that Convolutional Neural Networks are able to accurately predict accident rates exploiting Street View imagery along urban roads. The promising results point to the plausibility of aided design of safe urban landscapes, for both pedestrians and vehicles. In this paper, by considering historical accident data and Street View images, we detail how to automatically predict the impact (increase or decrease) of urban interventions on accident incidence. The results are positive, rendering an accuracies ranging from 60 to 80%. We additionally provide an interpretability analysis to unveil which specific categories of urban features impact accident rates positively or negatively. Considering the transportation network substrates (sidewalk and road networks) and their demand, we integrate these results to a complex network framework, to estimate the effective impact of urban change on the safety of pedestrians and vehicles. Results show that public authorities may leverage on machine learning tools to prioritize targeted interventions, since our analysis show that limited improvement is obtained with current tools. Further, our findings have a wider application range such as the design of safe urban routes for pedestrians or to the field of driver-assistance technologies.
abstract_zh: 在当今拥挤的城市环境中，行人和车辆之间的互动增加会带来负面影响：交通事故增加，而行人是最脆弱的群体。最近的工作表明，卷积神经网络能够利用城市道路沿线的街景图像准确预测事故率。这些令人鼓舞的结果表明，对于行人和车辆来说，安全城市景观的辅助设计是合理的。在本文中，通过考虑历史事故数据和街景图像，我们详细介绍了如何自动预测城市干预对事故发生率的影响（增加或减少）。结果是积极的，准确率在 60% 到 80% 之间。我们还提供了可解释性分析，以揭示哪些特定类别的城市特征对事故率产生积极或消极的影响。考虑到交通网络基质（人行道和道路网络）及其需求，我们将这些结果整合到一个复杂的网络框架中，以估计城市变化对行人和车辆安全的有效影响。结果表明，公共当局可以利用机器学习工具来优先考虑有针对性的干预措施，因为我们的分析表明，当前工具获得的改进有限。此外，我们的研究结果具有更广泛的应用范围，例如为行人设计安全的城市路线或驾驶辅助技术领域。

AI.tldr: 本文利用卷积神经网络和街道视图图像预测城市变化对行人和道路安全的影响，通过历史事故数据和特征分析提出改进方案。
AI.motivation: 城市环境中行人与车辆交互增加导致事故频发，现有工具难以有效预测城市干预措施的影响，亟需机器学习方法优化安全设计。
AI.method: 结合历史事故数据与街道视图图像，训练卷积神经网络预测事故变化，并通过可解释性分析识别关键城市特征，整合交通网络框架评估干预效果。
AI.result: 模型准确率达60-80%，明确不同城市特征对事故的正负影响，验证了复杂网络框架在评估安全影响中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 公共部门可借助机器学习工具优先实施针对性干预，当前方法较现有工具更具优势，研究结果可应用于安全路线设计及驾驶辅助技术领域。

method: 结合历史事故数据与街道视图图像，训练卷积神经网络预测事故变化，并通过可解释性分析识别关键城市特征，整合交通网络框架评估干预效果。
result: 模型准确率达60-80%，明确不同城市特征对事故的正负影响，验证了复杂网络框架在评估安全影响中的有效性。
conclusion: 公共部门可借助机器学习工具优先实施针对性干预，当前方法较现有工具更具优势，研究结果可应用于安全路线设计及驾驶辅助技术领域。
search_text: Predicting the impact of urban change in pedestrian and road safety 预测城市变化对行人和道路安全的影响 Increased interaction between and among pedestrians and vehicles in the crowded urban environments of today gives rise to a negative side-effect: a growth in traffic accidents, with pedestrians being the most vulnerable elements. Recent work has shown that Convolutional Neural Networks are able to accurately predict accident rates exploiting Street View imagery along urban roads. The promising results point to the plausibility of aided design of safe urban landscapes, for both pedestrians and vehicles. In this paper, by considering historical accident data and Street View images, we detail how to automatically predict the impact (increase or decrease) of urban interventions on accident incidence. The results are positive, rendering an accuracies ranging from 60 to 80%. We additionally provide an interpretability analysis to unveil which specific categories of urban features impact accident rates positively or negatively. Considering the transportation network substrates (sidewalk and road networks) and their demand, we integrate these results to a complex network framework, to estimate the effective impact of urban change on the safety of pedestrians and vehicles. Results show that public authorities may leverage on machine learning tools to prioritize targeted interventions, since our analysis show that limited improvement is obtained with current tools. Further, our findings have a wider application range such as the design of safe urban routes for pedestrians or to the field of driver-assistance technologies. 在当今拥挤的城市环境中，行人和车辆之间的互动增加会带来负面影响：交通事故增加，而行人是最脆弱的群体。最近的工作表明，卷积神经网络能够利用城市道路沿线的街景图像准确预测事故率。这些令人鼓舞的结果表明，对于行人和车辆来说，安全城市景观的辅助设计是合理的。在本文中，通过考虑历史事故数据和街景图像，我们详细介绍了如何自动预测城市干预对事故发生率的影响（增加或减少）。结果是积极的，准确率在 60% 到 80% 之间。我们还提供了可解释性分析，以揭示哪些特定类别的城市特征对事故率产生积极或消极的影响。考虑到交通网络基质（人行道和道路网络）及其需求，我们将这些结果整合到一个复杂的网络框架中，以估计城市变化对行人和车辆安全的有效影响。结果表明，公共当局可以利用机器学习工具来优先考虑有针对性的干预措施，因为我们的分析表明，当前工具获得的改进有限。此外，我们的研究结果具有更广泛的应用范围，例如为行人设计安全的城市路线或驾驶辅助技术领域。 本文利用卷积神经网络和街道视图图像预测城市变化对行人和道路安全的影响，通过历史事故数据和特征分析提出改进方案。 Cristina Bustos,Daniel Rhoads,Agata Lapedriza,Javier Borge-Holthoefer,Albert Solé-Ribalta cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Edo Liberty
title: Even Simpler Deterministic Matrix Sketching
title_zh: 更简单的确定性矩阵草图
abstract: This paper provides a one-line proof of Frequent Directions (FD) for sketching streams of matrices. The simpler proof arises from sketching the covariance of the stream of matrices rather than the stream itself.
summary: This paper provides a one-line proof of Frequent Directions (FD) for sketching streams of matrices. The simpler proof arises from sketching the covariance of the stream of matrices rather than the stream itself.
abstract_zh: 本文提供了一种用于绘制矩阵流的频繁方向 (FD) 的单行证明。更简单的证明来自于绘制矩阵流的协方差，而不是矩阵流本身。

AI.tldr: 本文提供了一种更简洁的确定性矩阵压缩方法证明，通过直接对矩阵流的协方差进行压缩而非原始流本身。
AI.motivation: 传统Frequent Directions方法的证明过程复杂，本文旨在通过简化证明过程，提升矩阵压缩算法的可理解性与实用性。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于协方差矩阵流的单行证明方法，通过直接压缩协方差矩阵替代原始矩阵流的处理。
AI.result: 成功实现了Frequent Directions方法的简化证明，验证了该方法在保持压缩效果的同时降低了计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为矩阵压缩提供了更高效且易于实现的理论支持，推动了流数据处理算法的优化与应用。

authors_text: ByungHoon So,Kyuhong Byun,Kyungwon Kang,Seongjin Cho
title: JaQuAD: Japanese Question Answering Dataset for Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: JaQuAD：用于机器阅读理解的日语问答数据集
abstract: Question Answering (QA) is a task in which a machine understands a given document and a question to find an answer. Despite impressive progress in the NLP area, QA is still a challenging problem, especially for non-English languages due to the lack of annotated datasets. In this paper, we present the Japanese Question Answering Dataset, JaQuAD, which is annotated by humans. JaQuAD consists of 39,696 extractive question-answer pairs on Japanese Wikipedia articles. We finetuned a baseline model which achieves 78.92% for F1 score and 63.38% for EM on test set. The dataset and our experiments are available at https://github.com/SkelterLabsInc/JaQuAD.
summary: Question Answering (QA) is a task in which a machine understands a given document and a question to find an answer. Despite impressive progress in the NLP area, QA is still a challenging problem, especially for non-English languages due to the lack of annotated datasets. In this paper, we present the Japanese Question Answering Dataset, JaQuAD, which is annotated by humans. JaQuAD consists of 39,696 extractive question-answer pairs on Japanese Wikipedia articles. We finetuned a baseline model which achieves 78.92% for F1 score and 63.38% for EM on test set. The dataset and our experiments are available at https://github.com/SkelterLabsInc/JaQuAD.
abstract_zh: 问答 (QA) 是一项机器理解给定文档和问题并找到答案的任务。尽管 NLP 领域取得了令人瞩目的进展，但 QA 仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是对于非英语语言，因为缺乏带注释的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了由人类注释的日语问答数据集 JaQuAD。 JaQuAD 由日语维基百科文章中的 39,696 个提取问答对组成。我们微调了一个基线模型，在测试集上 F1 分数达到 78.92%，EM 达到 63.38%。数据集和我们的实验可在 https://github.com/SkelterLabsInc/JaQuAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 构建用于机器阅读理解的日语问答数据集JaQuAD，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 非英语语言缺乏高质量问答数据集，限制了相关研究进展，需建立日语专用数据集推动技术发展。
AI.method: 基于日语维基百科创建包含39,696个问答对的人工标注数据集，微调基线模型进行评估。
AI.result: 测试集上达到F1 78.92%和EM 63.38%的性能，数据集及实验代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: JaQuAD填补了日语问答数据空白，为后续研究提供基准数据与实验参考。

authors_text: Yu Bai,Chi Jin,Song Mei,Tiancheng Yu
title: Near-Optimal Learning of Extensive-Form Games with Imperfect Information
title_zh: 不完全信息的扩展型博弈的近最优学习
comment: Updated V3 to be consistent with ICML 2022 camera-ready version, with an additional analysis of CFR in full-feedback setting in Appendix F
comments: Updated V3 to be consistent with ICML 2022 camera-ready version, with an additional analysis of CFR in full-feedback setting in Appendix F
abstract: This paper resolves the open question of designing near-optimal algorithms for learning imperfect-information extensive-form games from bandit feedback. We present the first line of algorithms that require only $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((XA+YB)/\varepsilon^2)$ episodes of play to find an $\varepsilon$-approximate Nash equilibrium in two-player zero-sum games, where $X,Y$ are the number of information sets and $A,B$ are the number of actions for the two players. This improves upon the best known sample complexity of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((X^2A+Y^2B)/\varepsilon^2)$ by a factor of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\max\{X, Y\})$, and matches the information-theoretic lower bound up to logarithmic factors. We achieve this sample complexity by two new algorithms: Balanced Online Mirror Descent, and Balanced Counterfactual Regret Minimization. Both algorithms rely on novel approaches of integrating \emph{balanced exploration policies} into their classical counterparts. We also extend our results to learning Coarse Correlated Equilibria in multi-player general-sum games.
summary: This paper resolves the open question of designing near-optimal algorithms for learning imperfect-information extensive-form games from bandit feedback. We present the first line of algorithms that require only $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((XA+YB)/\varepsilon^2)$ episodes of play to find an $\varepsilon$-approximate Nash equilibrium in two-player zero-sum games, where $X,Y$ are the number of information sets and $A,B$ are the number of actions for the two players. This improves upon the best known sample complexity of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((X^2A+Y^2B)/\varepsilon^2)$ by a factor of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\max\{X, Y\})$, and matches the information-theoretic lower bound up to logarithmic factors. We achieve this sample complexity by two new algorithms: Balanced Online Mirror Descent, and Balanced Counterfactual Regret Minimization. Both algorithms rely on novel approaches of integrating \emph{balanced exploration policies} into their classical counterparts. We also extend our results to learning Coarse Correlated Equilibria in multi-player general-sum games.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了设计近乎最优的算法以从强盗反馈中学习不完美信息扩展形式博弈的悬而未决的问题。我们提出的第一行算法只需要 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((XA+YB)/\varepsilon^2)$ 回合即可在两人零和游戏中找到 $\varepsilon$ 近似纳什均衡，其中 $X,Y$ 是信息集的数量，$A,B$ 是两个玩家的动作数量。这将已知的样本复杂度 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((X^2A+Y^2B)/\varepsilon^2)$ 提高了 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\max\{X, Y\})$ 因子，并将信息论下界与对数因子相匹配。我们通过两种新算法实现了这种样本复杂性：平衡在线镜像下降和平衡反事实遗憾最小化。这两种算法都依赖于将 emph{平衡探索策略} 集成到其经典算法中的新颖方法。我们还将我们的结果扩展到学习多人一般和游戏中的粗略相关均衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出近似最优算法，用于从带反馈的不完全信息广义博弈中学习纳什均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在学习不完全信息博弈时样本复杂度较高，无法满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计两种新算法：平衡在线镜像下降和平衡反事实遗憾最小化，通过引入平衡探索策略优化经典方法。
AI.result: 样本复杂度提升至O((XA+YB)/ε²)，较之前结果优化了O(max{X,Y})倍，并接近信息论下限。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在样本效率上达到理论最优，且可扩展至多玩家一般和博弈场景。

We achieve this sample complexity by two new algorithms: Balanced Online Mirror Descent, and Balanced Counterfactual Regret Minimization. Both algorithms rely on novel approaches of integrating \emph{balanced exploration policies} into their classical counterparts. We also extend our results to learning Coarse Correlated Equilibria in multi-player general-sum games. 本文解决了设计近乎最优的算法以从强盗反馈中学习不完美信息扩展形式博弈的悬而未决的问题。我们提出的第一行算法只需要 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((XA+YB)/\varepsilon^2)$ 回合即可在两人零和游戏中找到 $\varepsilon$ 近似纳什均衡，其中 $X,Y$ 是信息集的数量，$A,B$ 是两个玩家的动作数量。这将已知的样本复杂度 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}((X^2A+Y^2B)/\varepsilon^2)$ 提高了 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\max\{X, Y\})$ 因子，并将信息论下界与对数因子相匹配。我们通过两种新算法实现了这种样本复杂性：平衡在线镜像下降和平衡反事实遗憾最小化。这两种算法都依赖于将 emph{平衡探索策略} 集成到其经典算法中的新颖方法。我们还将我们的结果扩展到学习多人一般和游戏中的粗略相关均衡。 本文提出近似最优算法，用于从带反馈的不完全信息广义博弈中学习纳什均衡。 Yu Bai,Chi Jin,Song Mei,Tiancheng Yu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT,stat.ML

authors_text: Nikolaos-Antonios Ypsilantis,Noa Garcia,Guangxing Han,Sarah Ibrahimi,Nanne Van Noord,Giorgos Tolias
title: The Met Dataset: Instance-level Recognition for Artworks
title_zh: The Met 数据集：艺术品的实例级识别
abstract: This work introduces a dataset for large-scale instance-level recognition in the domain of artworks. The proposed benchmark exhibits a number of different challenges such as large inter-class similarity, long tail distribution, and many classes. We rely on the open access collection of The Met museum to form a large training set of about 224k classes, where each class corresponds to a museum exhibit with photos taken under studio conditions. Testing is primarily performed on photos taken by museum guests depicting exhibits, which introduces a distribution shift between training and testing. Testing is additionally performed on a set of images not related to Met exhibits making the task resemble an out-of-distribution detection problem. The proposed benchmark follows the paradigm of other recent datasets for instance-level recognition on different domains to encourage research on domain independent approaches. A number of suitable approaches are evaluated to offer a testbed for future comparisons. Self-supervised and supervised contrastive learning are effectively combined to train the backbone which is used for non-parametric classification that is shown as a promising direction. Dataset webpage: http://cmp.felk.cvut.cz/met/
summary: This work introduces a dataset for large-scale instance-level recognition in the domain of artworks. The proposed benchmark exhibits a number of different challenges such as large inter-class similarity, long tail distribution, and many classes. We rely on the open access collection of The Met museum to form a large training set of about 224k classes, where each class corresponds to a museum exhibit with photos taken under studio conditions. The proposed benchmark follows the paradigm of other recent datasets for instance-level recognition on different domains to encourage research on domain independent approaches. A number of suitable approaches are evaluated to offer a testbed for future comparisons. Self-supervised and supervised contrastive learning are effectively combined to train the backbone which is used for non-parametric classification that is shown as a promising direction. Dataset webpage: http://cmp.felk.cvut.cz/met/
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了一个用于艺术品领域大规模实例级识别的数据集。所提出的基准展示了许多不同的挑战，例如大的类间相似性、长尾分布和许多类。我们依靠大都会博物馆的开放获取馆藏形成了一个包含约 224k 个类的大型训练集，其中每个类对应一个博物馆展览，并包含在工作室条件下拍摄的照片。测试主要针对博物馆客人拍摄的展示展品的照片进行，这引入了训练和测试之间的分布转变。另外还对一组与 Met 展品无关的图像进行测试，使得该任务类似于分布外检测问题。所提出的基准遵循其他最新数据集的范式，用于不同领域的实例级识别，以鼓励对领域独立方法的研究。对许多合适的方法进行了评估，为未来的比较提供测试平台。自监督和监督对比学习有效地结合起来训练用于非参数分类的骨干网，这被证明是一个有前途的方向。数据集网页：http://cmp.felk.cvut.cz/met/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于艺术品实例级识别的大规模数据集，包含约224k个类别，并通过分布偏移测试集和分布外检测任务评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有实例级识别方法在艺术品领域缺乏统一基准，且需解决类间相似性高、长尾分布等挑战，同时需探索领域无关的通用方法。
AI.method: 基于大都会博物馆开放数据构建训练集，结合自监督与监督对比学习训练主干网络，采用非参数分类方法进行实例识别。
AI.result: 验证了结合自监督与监督学习的有效性，证明非参数分类在艺术品实例识别中的潜力，并为未来方法比较提供基准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为艺术品领域实例识别研究提供新基准，推动领域无关方法的发展，同时促进分布偏移和分布外检测方向的探索。

authors_text: Ben Cameron,Aaron Grubb,Joe Sawada
title: Pivot Gray Codes for the Spanning Trees of a Graph ft. the Fan
title_zh: 扇形图生成树的枢轴格雷码
comment: An extended version of arXiv:2108.09363 which was presented at COCOON 2021
comments: An extended version of arXiv:2108.09363 which was presented at COCOON 2021
abstract: We consider the problem of listing all spanning trees of a graph $G$ such that successive trees differ by pivoting a single edge around a vertex. Such a listing is called a "pivot Gray code", and it has more stringent conditions than known "revolving-door" Gray codes for spanning trees. Most revolving-door algorithms employ a standard edge-deletion/edge-contraction recursive approach which we demonstrate presents natural challenges when requiring the "pivot" property. Our main result is the discovery of a greedy strategy to list the spanning trees of the fan graph in a pivot Gray code order. It is the first greedy algorithm for exhaustively generating spanning trees using such a minimal change operation. The resulting listing is then studied to find a recursive algorithm that produces the same listing in $O(1)$-amortized time using $O(n)$ space. Additionally, we present $O(n)$-time algorithms for ranking and unranking the spanning trees for our listing; an improvement over the generic $O(n^3)$-time algorithm for ranking and unranking spanning trees of an arbitrary graph. Finally, we discuss how our listing can be applied to find a pivot Gray code for the wheel graph.
summary: We consider the problem of listing all spanning trees of a graph $G$ such that successive trees differ by pivoting a single edge around a vertex. Such a listing is called a "pivot Gray code", and it has more stringent conditions than known "revolving-door" Gray codes for spanning trees. Most revolving-door algorithms employ a standard edge-deletion/edge-contraction recursive approach which we demonstrate presents natural challenges when requiring the "pivot" property. Our main result is the discovery of a greedy strategy to list the spanning trees of the fan graph in a pivot Gray code order. It is the first greedy algorithm for exhaustively generating spanning trees using such a minimal change operation. The resulting listing is then studied to find a recursive algorithm that produces the same listing in $O(1)$-amortized time using $O(n)$ space. Additionally, we present $O(n)$-time algorithms for ranking and unranking the spanning trees for our listing; an improvement over the generic $O(n^3)$-time algorithm for ranking and unranking spanning trees of an arbitrary graph. Finally, we discuss how our listing can be applied to find a pivot Gray code for the wheel graph.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑列出图 $G$ 的所有生成树的问题，使得连续的树通过围绕顶点旋转单个边而有所不同。这样的列表被称为“枢轴格雷码”，并且它比已知的生成树“旋转门”格雷码具有更严格的条件。大多数旋转门算法都采用标准的边缘删除/边缘收缩递归方法，我们证明这种方法在需要“枢轴”属性时会带来自然的挑战。我们的主要结果是发现了一种贪婪策略，以枢轴格雷码顺序列出扇形图的生成树。它是第一个使用这种最小变化操作来详尽生成生成树的贪婪算法。然后研究生成的列表，以找到一种递归算法，该算法可以使用 $O(n)$ 空间在 $O(1)$ 摊销时间内生成相同的列表。此外，我们还提出了 O(n)$ 时间算法，用于对列表中的生成树进行排名和取消排名；对任意图的生成树进行排名和取消排名的通用 $O(n^3)$ 时间算法的改进。最后，我们讨论如何应用我们的列表来查找轮图的枢轴格雷码。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何以'pivot Gray code'方式列举图的所有生成树，重点针对扇形图（fan graph）提出了一种贪心策略。
AI.motivation: 传统的'revolving-door' Gray码生成方法无法满足生成树间单边旋转的严格条件，需探索更高效的生成策略。
AI.method: 提出贪心算法生成扇形图的pivot Gray码序列，并设计递归算法实现O(1)摊还时间复杂度与O(n)空间复杂度。
AI.result: 首次实现生成树的贪心枚举算法，改进排名/逆排名算法时间复杂度至O(n)，并推广至轮图（wheel graph）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成树的高效遍历提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他图结构的pivot Gray码生成。

authors_text: Tianhe Yu,Aviral Kumar,Yevgen Chebotar,Karol Hausman,Chelsea Finn,Sergey Levine
title: How to Leverage Unlabeled Data in Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 如何在离线强化学习中利用未标记数据
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can learn control policies from static datasets but, like standard RL methods, it requires reward annotations for every transition. In many cases, labeling large datasets with rewards may be costly, especially if those rewards must be provided by human labelers, while collecting diverse unlabeled data might be comparatively inexpensive. How can we best leverage such unlabeled data in offline RL? One natural solution is to learn a reward function from the labeled data and use it to label the unlabeled data. In this paper, we find that, perhaps surprisingly, a much simpler method that simply applies zero rewards to unlabeled data leads to effective data sharing both in theory and in practice, without learning any reward model at all. While this approach might seem strange (and incorrect) at first, we provide extensive theoretical and empirical analysis that illustrates how it trades off reward bias, sample complexity and distributional shift, often leading to good results. We characterize conditions under which this simple strategy is effective, and further show that extending it with a simple reweighting approach can further alleviate the bias introduced by using incorrect reward labels. Our empirical evaluation confirms these findings in simulated robotic locomotion, navigation, and manipulation settings.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can learn control policies from static datasets but, like standard RL methods, it requires reward annotations for every transition. In many cases, labeling large datasets with rewards may be costly, especially if those rewards must be provided by human labelers, while collecting diverse unlabeled data might be comparatively inexpensive. How can we best leverage such unlabeled data in offline RL? One natural solution is to learn a reward function from the labeled data and use it to label the unlabeled data. In this paper, we find that, perhaps surprisingly, a much simpler method that simply applies zero rewards to unlabeled data leads to effective data sharing both in theory and in practice, without learning any reward model at all. While this approach might seem strange (and incorrect) at first, we provide extensive theoretical and empirical analysis that illustrates how it trades off reward bias, sample complexity and distributional shift, often leading to good results. We characterize conditions under which this simple strategy is effective, and further show that extending it with a simple reweighting approach can further alleviate the bias introduced by using incorrect reward labels. Our empirical evaluation confirms these findings in simulated robotic locomotion, navigation, and manipulation settings.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习 (RL) 可以从静态数据集中学习控制策略，但与标准 RL 方法一样，它需要为每个转换提供奖励注释。在许多情况下，用奖励标记大型数据集可能成本高昂，特别是如果这些奖励必须由人类标记者提供，而收集各种未标记数据可能相对便宜。我们如何在离线强化学习中最好地利用这些未标记的数据？一种自然的解决方案是从标记数据中学习奖励函数，并用它来标记未标记数据。在本文中，我们发现，也许令人惊讶的是，一种简单得多的方法，只需将零奖励应用于未标记的数据，就可以在理论上和实践中实现有效的数据共享，而无需学习任何奖励模型。虽然这种方法一开始可能看起来很奇怪（而且不正确），但我们提供了广泛的理论和实证分析，说明了它如何权衡奖励偏差、样本复杂性和分布变化，通常会带来良好的结果。我们描述了这种简单策略有效的条件，并进一步表明，通过简单的重新加权方法扩展它可以进一步减轻因使用不正确的奖励标签而引入的偏差。我们的实证评估在模拟机器人运动、导航和操作设置中证实了这些发现。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何在离线强化学习中有效利用未标记数据。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习需要为每个转移标注奖励，但标注大规模数据成本较高。而收集未标记数据相对容易，因此需要找到有效利用未标记数据的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种简单的方法，即对未标记数据赋予零奖励，从而实现有效的数据共享，而无需学习奖励模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在理论和实践中均有效，并且通过简单的重加权方法可以进一步减少偏差。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了在特定条件下，简单的方法可以有效利用未标记数据，并通过重加权方法进一步优化结果。

search_text: How to Leverage Unlabeled Data in Offline Reinforcement Learning 如何在离线强化学习中利用未标记数据 Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can learn control policies from static datasets but, like standard RL methods, it requires reward annotations for every transition. In many cases, labeling large datasets with rewards may be costly, especially if those rewards must be provided by human labelers, while collecting diverse unlabeled data might be comparatively inexpensive. How can we best leverage such unlabeled data in offline RL? One natural solution is to learn a reward function from the labeled data and use it to label the unlabeled data. In this paper, we find that, perhaps surprisingly, a much simpler method that simply applies zero rewards to unlabeled data leads to effective data sharing both in theory and in practice, without learning any reward model at all. While this approach might seem strange (and incorrect) at first, we provide extensive theoretical and empirical analysis that illustrates how it trades off reward bias, sample complexity and distributional shift, often leading to good results. We characterize conditions under which this simple strategy is effective, and further show that extending it with a simple reweighting approach can further alleviate the bias introduced by using incorrect reward labels. Our empirical evaluation confirms these findings in simulated robotic locomotion, navigation, and manipulation settings. 离线强化学习 (RL) 可以从静态数据集中学习控制策略，但与标准 RL 方法一样，它需要为每个转换提供奖励注释。在许多情况下，用奖励标记大型数据集可能成本高昂，特别是如果这些奖励必须由人类标记者提供，而收集各种未标记数据可能相对便宜。我们如何在离线强化学习中最好地利用这些未标记的数据？一种自然的解决方案是从标记数据中学习奖励函数，并用它来标记未标记数据。在本文中，我们发现，也许令人惊讶的是，一种简单得多的方法，只需将零奖励应用于未标记的数据，就可以在理论上和实践中实现有效的数据共享，而无需学习任何奖励模型。虽然这种方法一开始可能看起来很奇怪（而且不正确），但我们提供了广泛的理论和实证分析，说明了它如何权衡奖励偏差、样本复杂性和分布变化，通常会带来良好的结果。我们描述了这种简单策略有效的条件，并进一步表明，通过简单的重新加权方法扩展它可以进一步减轻因使用不正确的奖励标签而引入的偏差。我们的实证评估在模拟机器人运动、导航和操作设置中证实了这些发现。 本文探讨了如何在离线强化学习中有效利用未标记数据。 Tianhe Yu,Aviral Kumar,Yevgen Chebotar,Karol Hausman,Chelsea Finn,Sergey Levine cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Alexander Raake,Markus Fiedler,Katrin Schoenenberg,Katrien De Moor,Nicola Döring
title: Technological Factors Influencing Videoconferencing and Zoom Fatigue
title_zh: 影响视频会议和变焦疲劳的技术因素
abstract: The paper presents a conceptual, multidimensional approach to understand the technological factors that are assumed to or even have been proven to contribute to what has been coined as Zoom Fatigue (ZF) or more generally Videoconferencing Fatigue (VCF). With the advent of the Covid-19 pandemic, the usage of VC services has drastically increased, leading to more and more reports about the ZF or VCF phenomenon. The paper is motivated by the fact that some of the media outlets initially starting the debate on what Zoom fatigue is and how it can be avoided, as well as some of the scientific papers addressing the topic, contain assumptions that are rather hypothetical and insufficiently underpinned by scientific evidence. Most of these works are acknowledge the lacking evidence and partly suggest directions for future research. This paper intends to deepen the survey of VC-technology-related literature and to provide more existing evidence, where possible, while reviewing some of the already provided support or evidence for certain causal hypotheses. The technological factors dimension and its identified sub-dimensions presented in this paper are embedded within a more holistic four-dimensional conceptual factors model describing the causes for ZF or VCF. The paper describing this overall conceptual model is written by the same group of authors and currently under revision for an Open Access Journal publication. The present paper expands on the technological factors dimension descriptions provided in the overall model paper and provides more detailed analyzes and concepts associated with how VC technology may affect users' perception, cognitive load, interaction and communication, possibly leading to stress, exhaustion and fatigue. The paper currently is a living document which will be expanded further with regard to the evidence for or against the impact of certain technological factors.
summary: The paper presents a conceptual, multidimensional approach to understand the technological factors that are assumed to or even have been proven to contribute to what has been coined as Zoom Fatigue (ZF) or more generally Videoconferencing Fatigue (VCF). With the advent of the Covid-19 pandemic, the usage of VC services has drastically increased, leading to more and more reports about the ZF or VCF phenomenon. The paper is motivated by the fact that some of the media outlets initially starting the debate on what Zoom fatigue is and how it can be avoided, as well as some of the scientific papers addressing the topic, contain assumptions that are rather hypothetical and insufficiently underpinned by scientific evidence. Most of these works are acknowledge the lacking evidence and partly suggest directions for future research. This paper intends to deepen the survey of VC-technology-related literature and to provide more existing evidence, where possible, while reviewing some of the already provided support or evidence for certain causal hypotheses. The technological factors dimension and its identified sub-dimensions presented in this paper are embedded within a more holistic four-dimensional conceptual factors model describing the causes for ZF or VCF. The paper describing this overall conceptual model is written by the same group of authors and currently under revision for an Open Access Journal publication. The present paper expands on the technological factors dimension descriptions provided in the overall model paper and provides more detailed analyzes and concepts associated with how VC technology may affect users' perception, cognitive load, interaction and communication, possibly leading to stress, exhaustion and fatigue. The paper currently is a living document which will be expanded further with regard to the evidence for or against the impact of certain technological factors.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种概念性的多维方法来理解被假定或什至已被证明会导致所谓的变焦疲劳（ZF）或更普遍的视频会议疲劳（VCF）的技术因素。随着 Covid-19 大流行的出现，VC 服务的使用量急剧增加，导致有关 ZF 或 VCF 现象的报道越来越多。这篇论文的动机是，一些媒体最初开始就什么是变焦疲劳以及如何避免变焦疲劳进行辩论，以及一些讨论该主题的科学论文，其中包含相当假设性且缺乏科学证据支持的假设。这些作品大多数都承认缺乏证据，并部分提出了未来研究的方向。本文旨在深化对风险投资技术相关文献的调查，并在可能的情况下提供更多现有证据，同时回顾一些已经为某些因果假设提供的支持或证据。本文提出的技术因素维度及其确定的子维度嵌入到一个更全面的四维概念因素模型中，描述了 ZF 或 VCF 的原因。描述这个整体概念模型的论文是由同一组作者撰写的，目前正在为开放获取期刊出版物进行修订。本文扩展了整个模型论文中提供的技术因素维度描述，并提供了与虚拟现实技术如何影响用户的感知、认知负荷、交互和沟通，并可能导致压力、疲惫和疲劳相关的更详细的分析和概念。该论文目前是一份动态文件，将进一步扩展支持或反对某些技术因素影响的证据。

AI.tldr: 论文的主要任务是探讨影响视频会议和Zoom疲劳的技术因素，提出一个四维概念模型，并详细分析技术因素如何影响用户。
AI.motivation: 现有研究和媒体报道对Zoom疲劳的假设缺乏科学证据，因此需要更深入的文献综述和现有证据的梳理。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和概念分析，扩展技术因素维度，并审查已有证据支持因果假设。
AI.result: 提出了技术因素的子维度，并分析其对用户感知、认知负荷和沟通的影响，为未来研究提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 论文作为动态文档将持续更新，未来需进一步验证技术因素的影响。

authors_text: Dario Fuoli,Martin Danelljan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Fast Online Video Super-Resolution with Deformable Attention Pyramid
title_zh: 具有可变形注意力金字塔的快速在线视频超分辨率
abstract: Video super-resolution (VSR) has many applications that pose strict causal, real-time, and latency constraints, including video streaming and TV. We address the VSR problem under these settings, which poses additional important challenges since information from future frames is unavailable. Importantly, designing efficient, yet effective frame alignment and fusion modules remain central problems. In this work, we propose a recurrent VSR architecture based on a deformable attention pyramid (DAP). Our DAP aligns and integrates information from the recurrent state into the current frame prediction. To circumvent the computational cost of traditional attention-based methods, we only attend to a limited number of spatial locations, which are dynamically predicted by the DAP. Comprehensive experiments and analysis of the proposed key innovations show the effectiveness of our approach. We significantly reduce processing time and computational complexity in comparison to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a high performance. We surpass state-of-the-art method EDVR-M on two standard benchmarks with a speed-up of over $3\times$.
summary: Video super-resolution (VSR) has many applications that pose strict causal, real-time, and latency constraints, including video streaming and TV. We address the VSR problem under these settings, which poses additional important challenges since information from future frames is unavailable. Importantly, designing efficient, yet effective frame alignment and fusion modules remain central problems. In this work, we propose a recurrent VSR architecture based on a deformable attention pyramid (DAP). Our DAP aligns and integrates information from the recurrent state into the current frame prediction. To circumvent the computational cost of traditional attention-based methods, we only attend to a limited number of spatial locations, which are dynamically predicted by the DAP. Comprehensive experiments and analysis of the proposed key innovations show the effectiveness of our approach. We significantly reduce processing time and computational complexity in comparison to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a high performance. We surpass state-of-the-art method EDVR-M on two standard benchmarks with a speed-up of over $3\times$.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率 (VSR) 的许多应用都具有严格的因果性、实时性和延迟限制，包括视频流和电视。我们解决了这些设置下的 VSR 问题，这带来了额外的重要挑战，因为来自未来帧的信息不可用。重要的是，设计高效且有效的框架对齐和融合模块仍然是核心问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于可变形注意力金字塔（DAP）的循环 VSR 架构。我们的 DAP 将来自循环状态的信息对齐并集成到当前帧预测中。为了规避传统基于注意力的方法的计算成本，我们只关注有限数量的空间位置，这些位置由 DAP 动态预测。对所提出的关键创新的综合实验和分析表明了我们方法的有效性。与最先进的方法相比，我们显着减少了处理时间和计算复杂性，同时保持了高性能。我们在两个标准基准测试中超越了最先进的方法 EDVR-M，加速超过 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可变形注意力金字塔的实时视频超分辨率方法，以解决在线视频处理中的计算效率与性能平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视频超分辨率方法在实时场景下因无法获取未来帧信息且计算复杂度高，难以满足低延迟需求，亟需高效且有效的帧对齐与融合机制。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于可变形注意力金字塔（DAP）的递归架构，通过动态预测有限空间位置实现当前帧与递归状态信息的对齐与融合，降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上以超过3倍的速度超越了EDVR-M等先进方法，在保持高性能的同时显著减少处理时间和计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的DAP机制有效平衡了实时性与超分辨率性能，为在线视频处理提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Fast Online Video Super-Resolution with Deformable Attention Pyramid 具有可变形注意力金字塔的快速在线视频超分辨率 Video super-resolution (VSR) has many applications that pose strict causal, real-time, and latency constraints, including video streaming and TV. We address the VSR problem under these settings, which poses additional important challenges since information from future frames is unavailable. Importantly, designing efficient, yet effective frame alignment and fusion modules remain central problems. In this work, we propose a recurrent VSR architecture based on a deformable attention pyramid (DAP). Our DAP aligns and integrates information from the recurrent state into the current frame prediction. To circumvent the computational cost of traditional attention-based methods, we only attend to a limited number of spatial locations, which are dynamically predicted by the DAP. Comprehensive experiments and analysis of the proposed key innovations show the effectiveness of our approach. We significantly reduce processing time and computational complexity in comparison to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a high performance. We surpass state-of-the-art method EDVR-M on two standard benchmarks with a speed-up of over $3\times$. 视频超分辨率 (VSR) 的许多应用都具有严格的因果性、实时性和延迟限制，包括视频流和电视。我们解决了这些设置下的 VSR 问题，这带来了额外的重要挑战，因为来自未来帧的信息不可用。重要的是，设计高效且有效的框架对齐和融合模块仍然是核心问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于可变形注意力金字塔（DAP）的循环 VSR 架构。我们的 DAP 将来自循环状态的信息对齐并集成到当前帧预测中。为了规避传统基于注意力的方法的计算成本，我们只关注有限数量的空间位置，这些位置由 DAP 动态预测。对所提出的关键创新的综合实验和分析表明了我们方法的有效性。与最先进的方法相比，我们显着减少了处理时间和计算复杂性，同时保持了高性能。我们在两个标准基准测试中超越了最先进的方法 EDVR-M，加速超过 3 倍。 本文提出了一种基于可变形注意力金字塔的实时视频超分辨率方法，以解决在线视频处理中的计算效率与性能平衡问题。 Dario Fuoli,Martin Danelljan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Filtjens,Bart Vanrumste,Peter Slaets
title: Skeleton-Based Action Segmentation with Multi-Stage Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于骨架的多级时空图卷积神经网络动作分割
abstract: The ability to identify and temporally segment fine-grained actions in motion capture sequences is crucial for applications in human movement analysis. Motion capture is typically performed with optical or inertial measurement systems, which encode human movement as a time series of human joint locations and orientations or their higher-order representations. State-of-the-art action segmentation approaches use multiple stages of temporal convolutions. The main idea is to generate an initial prediction with several layers of temporal convolutions and refine these predictions over multiple stages, also with temporal convolutions. Although these approaches capture long-term temporal patterns, the initial predictions do not adequately consider the spatial hierarchy among the human joints. To address this limitation, we recently introduced multi-stage spatial-temporal graph convolutional neural networks (MS-GCN). Our framework replaces the initial stage of temporal convolutions with spatial graph convolutions and dilated temporal convolutions, which better exploit the spatial configuration of the joints and their long-term temporal dynamics. Our framework was compared to four strong baselines on five tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework is a strong baseline for skeleton-based action segmentation.
summary: The ability to identify and temporally segment fine-grained actions in motion capture sequences is crucial for applications in human movement analysis. Motion capture is typically performed with optical or inertial measurement systems, which encode human movement as a time series of human joint locations and orientations or their higher-order representations. State-of-the-art action segmentation approaches use multiple stages of temporal convolutions. The main idea is to generate an initial prediction with several layers of temporal convolutions and refine these predictions over multiple stages, also with temporal convolutions. Although these approaches capture long-term temporal patterns, the initial predictions do not adequately consider the spatial hierarchy among the human joints. To address this limitation, we recently introduced multi-stage spatial-temporal graph convolutional neural networks (MS-GCN). Our framework replaces the initial stage of temporal convolutions with spatial graph convolutions and dilated temporal convolutions, which better exploit the spatial configuration of the joints and their long-term temporal dynamics. Our framework was compared to four strong baselines on five tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework is a strong baseline for skeleton-based action segmentation.
abstract_zh: 识别和暂时分割运动捕捉序列中细粒度动作的能力对于人体运动分析的应用至关重要。运动捕捉通常使用光学或惯性测量系统来执行，这些系统将人体运动编码为人体关节位置和方向或其高阶表示的时间序列。最先进的动作分割方法使用多个阶段的时间卷积。主要思想是使用多层时间卷积生成初始预测，并在多个阶段（也使用时间卷积）细化这些预测。尽管这些方法捕获了长期时间模式，但最初的预测并未充分考虑人体关节之间的空间层次结构。为了解决这个限制，我们最近引入了多阶段时空图卷积神经网络（MS-GCN）。我们的框架用空间图卷积和扩张时间卷积取代了初始阶段的时间卷积，这更好地利用了关节的空间配置及其长期时间动态。我们的框架与五项任务的四个强大基线进行了比较。实验结果表明，我们的框架是基于骨架的动作分割的强大基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨骼的动作分割方法，利用多阶段时空图卷积神经网络（MS-GCN）来提升动作识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽能捕捉长期时间模式，但初始预测未充分考虑人体关节的空间层次关系，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 通过将初始时间卷积替换为图卷积和扩张时间卷积，结合多阶段网络结构，同时建模关节空间配置与长期时间动态。
AI.result: 在五个任务中对比四个强基线，实验结果验证了该框架在骨骼动作分割任务中的有效性，成为新的基准方法。
AI.conclusion: MS-GCN通过整合空间与时间信息，显著提升了动作分割精度，为后续研究提供了可靠基准。

authors_text: Bobby Yan,Skyler Seto,Nicholas Apostoloff
title: FORML: Learning to Reweight Data for Fairness
title_zh: 正式：学习重新加权数据以实现公平
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Presented at ICML 2022 DataPerf Workshop
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures, Presented at ICML 2022 DataPerf Workshop
abstract: Machine learning models are trained to minimize the mean loss for a single metric, and thus typically do not consider fairness and robustness. Neglecting such metrics in training can make these models prone to fairness violations when training data are imbalanced or test distributions differ. This work introduces Fairness Optimized Reweighting via Meta-Learning (FORML), a training algorithm that balances fairness and robustness with accuracy by jointly learning training sample weights and neural network parameters. The approach increases model fairness by learning to balance the contributions from both over- and under-represented sub-groups through dynamic reweighting of the data learned from a user-specified held-out set representative of the distribution under which fairness is desired. FORML improves equality of opportunity fairness criteria on image classification tasks, reduces bias of corrupted labels, and facilitates building more fair datasets via data condensation. These improvements are achieved without pre-processing data or post-processing model outputs, without learning an additional weighting function, without changing model architecture, and while maintaining accuracy on the original predictive metric.
summary: Machine learning models are trained to minimize the mean loss for a single metric, and thus typically do not consider fairness and robustness. Neglecting such metrics in training can make these models prone to fairness violations when training data are imbalanced or test distributions differ. This work introduces Fairness Optimized Reweighting via Meta-Learning (FORML), a training algorithm that balances fairness and robustness with accuracy by jointly learning training sample weights and neural network parameters. The approach increases model fairness by learning to balance the contributions from both over- and under-represented sub-groups through dynamic reweighting of the data learned from a user-specified held-out set representative of the distribution under which fairness is desired. FORML improves equality of opportunity fairness criteria on image classification tasks, reduces bias of corrupted labels, and facilitates building more fair datasets via data condensation. These improvements are achieved without pre-processing data or post-processing model outputs, without learning an additional weighting function, without changing model architecture, and while maintaining accuracy on the original predictive metric.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型经过训练以最小化单个指标的平均损失，因此通常不考虑公平性和鲁棒性。当训练数据不平衡或测试分布不同时，在训练中忽视这些指标可能会使这些模型容易违反公平性。这项工作引入了通过元学习的公平优化重加权（FORML），这是一种通过联合学习训练样本权重和神经网络参数来平衡公平性和鲁棒性与准确性的训练算法。该方法通过对从用户指定的保留集（代表期望公平性的分布）中学习的数据进行动态重新加权，学习平衡代表性过高和代表性不足的子组的贡献，从而提高模型的公平性。 FORML 改进了图像分类任务的机会均等公平标准，减少了损坏标签的偏差，并有助于通过数据压缩构建更公平的数据集。这些改进是在无需预处理数据或后处理模型输出、无需学习额外的加权函数、无需改变模型架构的情况下实现的，同时保持了原始预测指标的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FORML方法，通过动态学习数据权重在保持模型准确性的同时提升公平性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型仅优化单一指标，忽视公平性导致在数据不平衡或分布差异时出现偏倚，需在不改变模型结构的前提下解决公平性问题。
AI.method: 联合学习样本权重与网络参数，利用保留集动态调整数据权重，无需预处理/后处理或修改模型架构。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中提升公平性指标，降低标签偏差，促进构建公平数据集，同时保持原始预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: FORML通过数据重加权有效平衡公平与准确，提供无需额外处理步骤的公平性优化方案。

The approach increases model fairness by learning to balance the contributions from both over- and under-represented sub-groups through dynamic reweighting of the data learned from a user-specified held-out set representative of the distribution under which fairness is desired. FORML improves equality of opportunity fairness criteria on image classification tasks, reduces bias of corrupted labels, and facilitates building more fair datasets via data condensation. These improvements are achieved without pre-processing data or post-processing model outputs, without learning an additional weighting function, without changing model architecture, and while maintaining accuracy on the original predictive metric. 机器学习模型经过训练以最小化单个指标的平均损失，因此通常不考虑公平性和鲁棒性。当训练数据不平衡或测试分布不同时，在训练中忽视这些指标可能会使这些模型容易违反公平性。这项工作引入了通过元学习的公平优化重加权（FORML），这是一种通过联合学习训练样本权重和神经网络参数来平衡公平性和鲁棒性与准确性的训练算法。该方法通过对从用户指定的保留集（代表期望公平性的分布）中学习的数据进行动态重新加权，学习平衡代表性过高和代表性不足的子组的贡献，从而提高模型的公平性。 FORML 改进了图像分类任务的机会均等公平标准，减少了损坏标签的偏差，并有助于通过数据压缩构建更公平的数据集。这些改进是在无需预处理数据或后处理模型输出、无需学习额外的加权函数、无需改变模型架构的情况下实现的，同时保持了原始预测指标的准确性。 本文提出FORML方法，通过动态学习数据权重在保持模型准确性的同时提升公平性。 Bobby Yan,Skyler Seto,Nicholas Apostoloff cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Niclas Boehmer,Robert Bredereck,Klaus Heeger,Dušan Knop,Junjie Luo
title: Multivariate Algorithmics for Eliminating Envy by Donating Goods
title_zh: 通过捐赠物品消除嫉妒的多元算法
abstract: Fairly dividing a set of indivisible resources to a set of agents is of utmost importance in some applications. However, after an allocation has been implemented the preferences of agents might change and envy might arise. We study the following problem to cope with such situations: Given an allocation of indivisible resources to agents with additive utility-based preferences, is it possible to socially donate some of the resources (which means removing these resources from the allocation instance) such that the resulting modified allocation is envy-free (up to one good). We require that the number of deleted resources and/or the caused utilitarian welfare loss of the allocation are bounded. We conduct a thorough study of the (parameterized) computational complexity of this problem considering various natural and problem-specific parameters (e.g., the number of agents, the number of deleted resources, or the maximum number of resources assigned to an agent in the initial allocation) and different preference models, including unary and 0/1-valuations. In our studies, we obtain a rich set of (parameterized) tractability and intractability results and discover several surprising contrasts, for instance, between the two closely related fairness concepts envy-freeness and envy-freeness up to one good and between the influence of the parameters maximum number and welfare of the deleted resources.
summary: Fairly dividing a set of indivisible resources to a set of agents is of utmost importance in some applications. However, after an allocation has been implemented the preferences of agents might change and envy might arise. We study the following problem to cope with such situations: Given an allocation of indivisible resources to agents with additive utility-based preferences, is it possible to socially donate some of the resources (which means removing these resources from the allocation instance) such that the resulting modified allocation is envy-free (up to one good). We require that the number of deleted resources and/or the caused utilitarian welfare loss of the allocation are bounded. We conduct a thorough study of the (parameterized) computational complexity of this problem considering various natural and problem-specific parameters (e.g., the number of agents, the number of deleted resources, or the maximum number of resources assigned to an agent in the initial allocation) and different preference models, including unary and 0/1-valuations. In our studies, we obtain a rich set of (parameterized) tractability and intractability results and discover several surprising contrasts, for instance, between the two closely related fairness concepts envy-freeness and envy-freeness up to one good and between the influence of the parameters maximum number and welfare of the deleted resources.
abstract_zh: 在某些应用中，将一组不可分割的资源公平地分配给一组代理至关重要。然而，在实施分配后，代理商的偏好可能会发生变化，并且可能会产生嫉妒。我们研究以下问题来应对这种情况：给定将不可分割的资源分配给具有基于附加效用的偏好的代理，是否有可能社会捐赠一些资源（这意味着从分配实例中删除这些资源），使得最终的修改后的分配是无嫉妒的（最多一个好）。我们要求删除资源的数量和/或分配造成的功利性福利损失是有限的。我们对该问题的（参数化）计算复杂性进行了彻底的研究，考虑了各种自然和特定于问题的参数（例如，代理的数量、删除的资源数量或在初始分配中分配给代理的最大资源数量）和不同的偏好模型，包括一元和 0/1 评估。在我们的研究中，我们获得了一组丰富的（参数化的）易处理性和难处理性结果，并发现了一些令人惊讶的对比，例如，两个密切相关的公平概念无嫉妒性和无嫉妒性到一个好之间的对比，以及参数最大数量和删除资源的福利的影响之间的对比。

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过捐赠（移除）部分资源，使初始分配方案在删除资源后达到 envy-free up to one good（EF1）的公平性目标。
AI.motivation: 在资源不可分割的场景中，初始分配可能因偏好变化引发 envy，需通过移除资源实现公平性，同时控制删除数量和福利损失。
AI.method: 基于参数化计算复杂性分析，结合不同参数（如代理数量、删除资源数、初始分配最大资源数）和偏好模型（如 unary/0/1 估值）进行系统性研究。
AI.result: 发现 EF1 与 envy-freeness 的复杂性差异，揭示删除资源数量和福利损失参数对问题可解性的影响，并提出多项参数化可解性与不可解性结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化分析明确了实现 EF1 的计算复杂性边界，为实际应用中平衡公平性与效率提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Szu-Yu,Liu,Brian A. Smith,Rajan Vaish,Andrés Monroy-Hernández
title: Understanding the Role of Context in Creating Enjoyable Co-Located Interactions
title_zh: 了解情境在创建愉快的同地互动中的作用
abstract: In recent years, public discourse has blamed digital technologies for making people feel "alone together," distracting us from engaging with one another, even when we are interacting in-person. We argue that in order to design technologies that foster and augment co-located interactions, we need to first understand the context in which enjoyable co-located socialization takes place. We address this gap by surveying and interviewing over 1,000 U.S.-based participants to understand what, where, with whom, how, and why people enjoy spending time in-person. Our findings suggest that people enjoy engaging in everyday activities with individuals with whom they have strong social ties because it helps enable nonverbal cues, facilitate spontaneity, support authenticity, encourage undivided attention, and leverage the physicality of their bodies and the environment. We conclude by providing a set of recommendations for designers interested in creating co-located technologies that encourage social engagement and relationship building.
summary: In recent years, public discourse has blamed digital technologies for making people feel "alone together," distracting us from engaging with one another, even when we are interacting in-person. We argue that in order to design technologies that foster and augment co-located interactions, we need to first understand the context in which enjoyable co-located socialization takes place. We address this gap by surveying and interviewing over 1,000 U.S.-based participants to understand what, where, with whom, how, and why people enjoy spending time in-person. Our findings suggest that people enjoy engaging in everyday activities with individuals with whom they have strong social ties because it helps enable nonverbal cues, facilitate spontaneity, support authenticity, encourage undivided attention, and leverage the physicality of their bodies and the environment. We conclude by providing a set of recommendations for designers interested in creating co-located technologies that encourage social engagement and relationship building.
abstract_zh: 近年来，公众舆论指责数字技术让人们感到“孤独”，分散了我们彼此交流的注意力，即使我们是在面对面的互动。我们认为，为了设计促进和增强同地互动的技术，我们需要首先了解愉快的同地社交发生的背景。为了解决这一差距，我们对 1,000 多名美国参与者进行了调查和采访，以了解人们喜欢花什么时间、在哪里、与谁在一起、如何以及为什么喜欢面对面的交流。我们的研究结果表明，人们喜欢与与他们有密切社会联系的人一起参与日常活动，因为这有助于实现非语言暗示，促进自发性，支持真实性，鼓励全神贯注，并利用他们的身体和环境的物理性。最后，我们为有兴趣创建鼓励社会参与和建立关系的共地技术的设计师提供了一系列建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨情境在促进愉快的面对面互动中的作用，并研究人们享受面对面社交的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 数字技术被指责导致人们‘同处却孤独’，需理解情境以设计促进面对面互动的技术。
AI.method: 通过调查和访谈1000多名美国参与者，分析人们在时间、地点、对象、方式及原因上的面对面社交偏好。
AI.result: 人们享受与亲密关系者进行日常活动，因非语言交流、自发性、真实性、专注及环境利用。
AI.conclusion: 为设计师提供指导，开发促进社交参与和关系建立的共处技术。

authors_text: Leila Ismail,Huned Materwala,Hossam S. Hassanein
title: QoS-SLA-Aware Adaptive Genetic Algorithm for Multi-Request Offloading in Integrated Edge-Cloud Computing in Internet of Vehicles
title_zh: 车联网集成边缘云计算中多请求卸载的 QoS-SLA 感知自适应遗传算法
abstract: The Internet of Vehicles over Vehicular Ad-hoc Networks is an emerging technology enabling the development of smart city applications focused on improving traffic safety, traffic efficiency, and the overall driving experience. These applications have stringent requirements detailed in Service Level Agreement. Since vehicles have limited computational and storage capabilities, applications requests are offloaded onto an integrated edge-cloud computing system. Existing offloading solutions focus on optimizing the application's Quality of Service (QoS) in terms of execution time, and respecting a single SLA constraint. They do not consider the impact of overlapped multi-requests processing nor the vehicle's varying speed. This paper proposes a novel Artificial Intelligence QoS-SLA-aware adaptive genetic algorithm (QoS-SLA-AGA) to optimize the application's execution time for multi-request offloading in a heterogeneous edge-cloud computing system, which considers the impact of processing multi-requests overlapping and dynamic vehicle speed. The proposed genetic algorithm integrates an adaptive penalty function to assimilate the SLA constraints regarding latency, processing time, deadline, CPU, and memory requirements. Numerical experiments and analysis compare our QoS-SLA-AGA to random offloading, and baseline genetic-based approaches. Results show QoS-SLA-AGA executes the requests 1.22 times faster on average compared to the random offloading approach and with 59.9% fewer SLA violations. In contrast, the baseline genetic-based approach increases the requests' performance by 1.14 times, with 19.8% more SLA violations.
summary: The Internet of Vehicles over Vehicular Ad-hoc Networks is an emerging technology enabling the development of smart city applications focused on improving traffic safety, traffic efficiency, and the overall driving experience.
