Our results indicate that (1) state-of-the-art explanation methods often disagree in terms of the explanations they output, and (2) machine learning practitioners often employ ad hoc heuristics when resolving such disagreements. These findings suggest that practitioners may be relying on misleading explanations when making consequential decisions. They also underscore the importance of developing principled frameworks for effectively evaluating and comparing explanations output by various explanation techniques. 随着各种事后解释方法越来越多地被用来解释高风险环境中的复杂模型，更深入地了解这些方法输出的解释是否以及何时相互不一致，以及在实践中如何解决这些分歧变得至关重要。然而，几乎没有研究可以回答这些关键问题。在这项工作中，我们形式化并研究了可解释机器学习中的分歧问题。更具体地说，我们定义了解释之间分歧的概念，分析了这种分歧在实践中发生的频率，以及实践者如何解决这些分歧。我们首先与数据科学家进行访谈，以了解不同方法对同一模型预测产生的解释之间的分歧是什么构成的，并引入一种新颖的定量框架来形式化这种理解。然后，我们利用这个框架对四个现实世界数据集、六种最先进的事后解释方法和六种不同的预测模型进行严格的实证分析，以衡量各种流行解释方法产生的解释之间的分歧程度。此外，我们与数据科学家进行了在线用户研究，以了解他们如何解决上述分歧。我们的结果表明，（1）最先进的解释方法通常在其输出的解释方面存在分歧，（2）机器学习实践者在解决此类分歧时经常采用临时启发式方法。这些发现表明，从业者在做出相应的决定时可能会依赖误导性的解释。他们还强调了制定原则框架以有效评估和比较各种解释技术输出的解释的重要性。 本文旨在形式化并研究可解释机器学习中的解释分歧问题，分析不同解释方法在实际应用中的分歧程度及从业者如何解决这些分歧。 Satyapriya Krishna,Tessa Han,Alex Gu,Steven Wu,Shahin Jabbari,Himabindu Lakkaraju cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chunxiao Cao,Zili An,Zhong Ren,Dinesh Manocha,Kun Zhou
title: A Psychoacoustic Quality Criterion for Path-Traced Sound Propagation
title_zh: 路径追踪声音传播的心理声学质量标准
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures. To be published in IEEE TVCG
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures. To be published in IEEE TVCG
abstract: In developing virtual acoustic environments, it is important to understand the relationship between the computation cost and the perceptual significance of the resultant numerical error. In this paper, we propose a quality criterion that evaluates the error significance of path-tracing-based sound propagation simulators. We present an analytical formula that estimates the error signal power spectrum. With this spectrum estimation, we can use a modified Zwicker's loudness model to calculate the relative loudness of the error signal masked by the ideal output. Our experimental results show that the proposed criterion can explain the human perception of simulation error in a variety of cases.
summary: In developing virtual acoustic environments, it is important to understand the relationship between the computation cost and the perceptual significance of the resultant numerical error. In this paper, we propose a quality criterion that evaluates the error significance of path-tracing-based sound propagation simulators. We present an analytical formula that estimates the error signal power spectrum. With this spectrum estimation, we can use a modified Zwicker's loudness model to calculate the relative loudness of the error signal masked by the ideal output. Our experimental results show that the proposed criterion can explain the human perception of simulation error in a variety of cases.
abstract_zh: 在开发虚拟声学环境时，了解计算成本与所得数值误差的感知意义之间的关系非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种质量标准，用于评估基于路径跟踪的声音传播模拟器的误差显着性。我们提出了一个估计误差信号功率谱的分析公式。通过这种频谱估计，我们可以使用修改后的 Zwicker 响度模型来计算理想输出掩盖的误差信号的相对响度。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的标准可以解释人类在各种情况下对模拟误差的感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于心理声学的质量标准，用于评估路径追踪声传播模拟器的误差显著性。
AI.motivation: 在虚拟声学环境中，需平衡计算成本与感知误差，但现有方法难以量化误差对听觉的影响。
AI.method: 通过分析公式估计误差信号功率谱，并结合改进的Zwicker响度模型计算误差被理想输出掩蔽的相对响度。
AI.result: 实验表明该标准能有效解释多种场景下模拟误差的人类感知差异。
AI.conclusion: 该标准为虚拟声学环境提供了计算效率与感知质量的评估依据，助力资源优化。

authors_text: Leszek Gąsieniec,Tomasz Jurdziński,Ralf Klasing,Christos Levcopoulos,Andrzej Lingas,Jie Min,Tomasz Radzik
title: Perpetual maintenance of machines with different urgency requirements
title_zh: 对具有不同紧急要求的机器进行永久维护
comment: 34 pages; 3 figures. A preliminary version appeared in the proceedings of SOFSEM 2017
comments: 34 pages; 3 figures. A preliminary version appeared in the proceedings of SOFSEM 2017
abstract: A garden $G$ is populated by $n\ge 1$ bamboos $b_1, b_2, ..., b_n$ with the respective daily growth rates $h_1 \ge h_2 \ge \dots \ge h_n$. It is assumed that the initial heights of bamboos are zero. The robotic gardener maintaining the garden regularly attends bamboos and trims them to height zero according to some schedule. The Bamboo Garden Trimming Problem (BGT) is to design a perpetual schedule of cuts to maintain the elevation of the bamboo garden as low as possible. The bamboo garden is a metaphor for a collection of machines which have to be serviced, with different frequencies, by a robot which can service only one machine at a time. The objective is to design a perpetual schedule of servicing which minimizes the maximum (weighted) waiting time for servicing. We consider two variants of BGT. In discrete BGT the robot trims only one bamboo at the end of each day. In continuous BGT the bamboos can be cut at any time, however, the robot needs time to move from one bamboo to the next. For discrete BGT, we show tighter approximation algorithms for the case when the growth rates are balanced and for the general case. The former algorithm settles one of the conjectures about the Pinwheel problem. The general approximation algorithm improves on the previous best approximation ratio. For continuous BGT, we propose approximation algorithms which achieve approximation ratios $O(\log \lceil h_1/h_n\rceil)$ and $O(\log n)$.
summary: A garden $G$ is populated by $n\ge 1$ bamboos $b_1, b_2, ..., b_n$ with the respective daily growth rates $h_1 \ge h_2 \ge \dots \ge h_n$. It is assumed that the initial heights of bamboos are zero. The robotic gardener maintaining the garden regularly attends bamboos and trims them to height zero according to some schedule. The Bamboo Garden Trimming Problem (BGT) is to design a perpetual schedule of cuts to maintain the elevation of the bamboo garden as low as possible. The bamboo garden is a metaphor for a collection of machines which have to be serviced, with different frequencies, by a robot which can service only one machine at a time. The objective is to design a perpetual schedule of servicing which minimizes the maximum (weighted) waiting time for servicing. We consider two variants of BGT. In discrete BGT the robot trims only one bamboo at the end of each day. In continuous BGT the bamboos can be cut at any time, however, the robot needs time to move from one bamboo to the next. For discrete BGT, we show tighter approximation algorithms for the case when the growth rates are balanced and for the general case. The former algorithm settles one of the conjectures about the Pinwheel problem. The general approximation algorithm improves on the previous best approximation ratio. For continuous BGT, we propose approximation algorithms which achieve approximation ratios $O(\log \lceil h_1/h_n\rceil)$ and $O(\log n)$.
abstract_zh: 花园 $G$ 中长满了 $n\ge 1$ 竹子 $b_1, b_2, ..., b_n$，其日增长率分别为 $h_1 \ge h_2 \ge \dots \ge h_n$。假设竹子的初始高度为零。维护花园的机器人园丁定期照料竹子，并根据时间表将它们修剪至零高度。竹园修剪问题（BGT）是设计一个永久的修剪计划，以保持竹园的海拔尽可能低。竹园是对一组机器的隐喻，这些机器必须由机器人以不同的频率进行服务，而机器人一次只能服务一台机器。目标是设计一个永久的服务时间表，最大限度地减少服务的最大（加权）等待时间。我们考虑 BGT 的两种变体。在离散 BGT 中，机器人每天结束时仅修剪一根竹子。在连续 BGT 中，竹子可以随时切割，但是机器人需要时间从一根竹子移动到下一根竹子。对于离散 BGT，我们针对增长率平衡的情况和一般情况展示了更严格的近似算法。前一种算法解决了有关风车问题的猜想之一。通用逼近算法在之前的最佳逼近率的基础上进行了改进。对于连续 BGT，我们提出了近似算法，可实现近似比率 $O(\log \lceil h_1/h_n\rceil)$ 和 $O(\log n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为具有不同紧急程度需求的机器设计永久性维护计划，以最小化最大等待时间。
AI.motivation: 通过竹林修剪问题（BGT）的隐喻，模拟机器维护场景中单机器人按优先级服务多台机器的调度难题，需平衡不同增长速率的维护需求。
AI.method: 针对离散型BGT（每日修剪一株）和连续型BGT（任意时间修剪但需移动时间）分别设计近似算法，改进平衡增长率和一般情况下的近似比，并解决Pinwheel问题猜想。
AI.result: 离散BGT提出更优近似算法并验证Pinwheel猜想，连续BGT实现O(log(h₁/hₙ))和O(log n)近似比，提升维护调度效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文为异步多任务维护调度提供了理论框架和算法支持，推动了机器维护与资源分配领域的优化研究。

authors_text: Weizhen Liu,Qian He,Xuming He
title: Weakly Supervised Nuclei Segmentation via Instance Learning
title_zh: 通过实例学习进行弱监督细胞核分割
comment: Accepted by ISBI 2022 as Oral Presentation
comments: Accepted by ISBI 2022 as Oral Presentation
abstract: Weakly supervised nuclei segmentation is a critical problem for pathological image analysis and greatly benefits the community due to the significant reduction of labeling cost. Adopting point annotations, previous methods mostly rely on less expressive representations for nuclei instances and thus have difficulty in handling crowded nuclei. In this paper, we propose to decouple weakly supervised semantic and instance segmentation in order to enable more effective subtask learning and to promote instance-aware representation learning. To achieve this, we design a modular deep network with two branches: a semantic proposal network and an instance encoding network, which are trained in a two-stage manner with an instance-sensitive loss. Empirical results show that our approach achieves the state-of-the-art performance on two public benchmarks of pathological images from different types of organs.
summary: Weakly supervised nuclei segmentation is a critical problem for pathological image analysis and greatly benefits the community due to the significant reduction of labeling cost. Adopting point annotations, previous methods mostly rely on less expressive representations for nuclei instances and thus have difficulty in handling crowded nuclei. In this paper, we propose to decouple weakly supervised semantic and instance segmentation in order to enable more effective subtask learning and to promote instance-aware representation learning. To achieve this, we design a modular deep network with two branches: a semantic proposal network and an instance encoding network, which are trained in a two-stage manner with an instance-sensitive loss. Empirical results show that our approach achieves the state-of-the-art performance on two public benchmarks of pathological images from different types of organs.
abstract_zh: 弱监督细胞核分割是病理图像分析的一个关键问题，并且由于标记成本的显着降低而使社区受益匪浅。采用点注释，以前的方法大多依赖于核实例表达能力较差的表示，因此难以处理拥挤的核。在本文中，我们建议将弱监督语义和实例分割解耦，以实现更有效的子任务学习并促进实例感知表示学习。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个具有两个分支的模块化深度网络：语义提议网络和实例编码网络，它们以两阶段方式进行训练，并具有实例敏感损失。实证结果表明，我们的方法在来自不同类型器官的病理图像的两个公共基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实例学习的弱监督细胞核分割方法，通过解耦语义和实例分割任务提升病理图像分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法因依赖点标注和低表达特征，在处理密集细胞核时表现不足，而减少标注成本的弱监督需求亟待更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双分支模块化网络（语义提议网络与实例编码网络），采用两阶段训练策略并引入实例敏感损失函数进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在两个跨器官类型的病理图像基准数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦分割子任务与实例感知学习，本文方法显著提升了弱监督细胞核分割性能，为病理图像分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Nuclei Segmentation via Instance Learning 通过实例学习进行弱监督细胞核分割 Weakly supervised nuclei segmentation is a critical problem for pathological image analysis and greatly benefits the community due to the significant reduction of labeling cost. Adopting point annotations, previous methods mostly rely on less expressive representations for nuclei instances and thus have difficulty in handling crowded nuclei. In this paper, we propose to decouple weakly supervised semantic and instance segmentation in order to enable more effective subtask learning and to promote instance-aware representation learning. To achieve this, we design a modular deep network with two branches: a semantic proposal network and an instance encoding network, which are trained in a two-stage manner with an instance-sensitive loss. Empirical results show that our approach achieves the state-of-the-art performance on two public benchmarks of pathological images from different types of organs. 弱监督细胞核分割是病理图像分析的一个关键问题，并且由于标记成本的显着降低而使社区受益匪浅。采用点注释，以前的方法大多依赖于核实例表达能力较差的表示，因此难以处理拥挤的核。在本文中，我们建议将弱监督语义和实例分割解耦，以实现更有效的子任务学习并促进实例感知表示学习。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个具有两个分支的模块化深度网络：语义提议网络和实例编码网络，它们以两阶段方式进行训练，并具有实例敏感损失。实证结果表明，我们的方法在来自不同类型器官的病理图像的两个公共基准上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于实例学习的弱监督细胞核分割方法，通过解耦语义和实例分割任务提升病理图像分析效果。 Weizhen Liu,Qian He,Xuming He eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Jongyul Lee,Vasilis Friderikos
title: Robotic Aerial 6G Small Cells with Grasping End Effectors for mmWave Relay Backhauling
title_zh: 带有抓取末端执行器的机器人空中 6G 小型基站，用于毫米波中继回程
abstract: Deployment of small cells in dense urban areas dedicated to the heterogeneous network (HetNet) and associated relay nodes for improving backhauling is expected to be an important structural element in the design of beyond 5G (B5G) and 6G wireless access networks. A key operational aspect in HetNets is how to optimally implement the wireless backhaul links to efficiently support the traffic demand. In this work, we utilize the recently proposed Robotic Aerial Small Cells (RASCs) that are able to grasp at different tall urban landforms as wireless relay nodes for backhauling. This can be considered as an alternative to fixed small cells (FSCs) which lack flexibility since once installed their position cannot be altered. More specifically, on-demand deployment of RASCs is considered for constructing a millimeter-wave (mmWave) backhaul network to optimize available network capacity using a network flow-based mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation. Numerical investigations reveal that for the same required achievable throughput, the number of RASCs required are 25\% to 65\% less than the number of required FSCs. This result can have significant implications in reducing required wireless network equipment (capex) to provide a given network capacity and allows for an efficient and flexible network densification.
summary: Deployment of small cells in dense urban areas dedicated to the heterogeneous network (HetNet) and associated relay nodes for improving backhauling is expected to be an important structural element in the design of beyond 5G (B5G) and 6G wireless access networks. A key operational aspect in HetNets is how to optimally implement the wireless backhaul links to efficiently support the traffic demand. In this work, we utilize the recently proposed Robotic Aerial Small Cells (RASCs) that are able to grasp at different tall urban landforms as wireless relay nodes for backhauling. This can be considered as an alternative to fixed small cells (FSCs) which lack flexibility since once installed their position cannot be altered. More specifically, on-demand deployment of RASCs is considered for constructing a millimeter-wave (mmWave) backhaul network to optimize available network capacity using a network flow-based mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation. Numerical investigations reveal that for the same required achievable throughput, the number of RASCs required are 25\% to 65\% less than the number of required FSCs. This result can have significant implications in reducing required wireless network equipment (capex) to provide a given network capacity and allows for an efficient and flexible network densification.
abstract_zh: 在密集城市地区部署小型蜂窝，专用于异构网络 (HetNet) 和相关中继节点以改善回程，预计将成为超 5G (B5G) 和 6G 无线接入网络设计中的重要结构元素。 HetNet 的一个关键运营方面是如何优化实施无线回程链路以有效支持流量需求。在这项工作中，我们利用最近提出的机器人空中小型基站（RASC），它能够抓住不同的高层城市地形作为回程的无线中继节点。这可以被视为固定小基站 (FSC) 的替代方案，后者缺乏灵活性，因为一旦安装，其位置就无法更改。更具体地说，考虑按需部署 RASC 来构建毫米波 (mmWave) 回程网络，以使用基于网络流的混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式来优化可用网络容量。数值研究表明，对于相同的所需可实现吞吐量，所需的 RASC 数量比所需的 FSC 数量少 25% 至 65%。这一结果对于减少提供给定网络容量所需的无线网络设备（资本支出）并实现高效、灵活的网络致密化具有重大意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用可抓取的机器人空中小蜂窝（RASCs）作为毫米波回传网络的无线中继节点，优化异构网络（HetNet）的回传链路部署。
AI.motivation: 传统固定小蜂窝（FSCs）部署后位置不可调整，缺乏灵活性，难以高效满足密集城区异构网络的容量需求。
AI.method: 基于网络流的混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型，对RASCs按需部署的毫米波回传网络进行优化设计。
AI.result: 在相同吞吐量需求下，RASCs所需数量比FSCs减少25%至65%，显著降低设备成本并提升网络灵活性。
AI.conclusion: RASCs可有效降低无线网络设备资本支出，为6G网络提供高效灵活的密集化部署方案。

authors_text: Mahdi Saleh,Shun-Cheng Wu,Luca Cosmo,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari
title: Bending Graphs: Hierarchical Shape Matching using Gated Optimal Transport
title_zh: 弯曲图：使用门控最优传输的分层形状匹配
abstract: Shape matching has been a long-studied problem for the computer graphics and vision community. The objective is to predict a dense correspondence between meshes that have a certain degree of deformation. Existing methods either consider the local description of sampled points or discover correspondences based on global shape information. In this work, we investigate a hierarchical learning design, to which we incorporate local patch-level information and global shape-level structures. This flexible representation enables correspondence prediction and provides rich features for the matching stage. Finally, we propose a novel optimal transport solver by recurrently updating features on non-confident nodes to learn globally consistent correspondences between the shapes. Our results on publicly available datasets suggest robust performance in presence of severe deformations without the need for extensive training or refinement.
summary: Shape matching has been a long-studied problem for the computer graphics and vision community. The objective is to predict a dense correspondence between meshes that have a certain degree of deformation. Existing methods either consider the local description of sampled points or discover correspondences based on global shape information. In this work, we investigate a hierarchical learning design, to which we incorporate local patch-level information and global shape-level structures. This flexible representation enables correspondence prediction and provides rich features for the matching stage. Finally, we propose a novel optimal transport solver by recurrently updating features on non-confident nodes to learn globally consistent correspondences between the shapes. Our results on publicly available datasets suggest robust performance in presence of severe deformations without the need for extensive training or refinement.
abstract_zh: 形状匹配一直是计算机图形和视觉界长期研究的问题。目标是预测具有一定变形程度的网格之间的密集对应关系。现有的方法要么考虑采样点的局部描述，要么根据全局形状信息发现对应关系。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种分层学习设计，其中结合了局部补丁级信息和全局形状级结构。这种灵活的表示可以实现对应预测，并为匹配阶段提供丰富的特征。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的最佳传输求解器，通过反复更新非置信节点上的特征来学习形状之间的全局一致对应关系。我们对公开数据集的结果表明，在存在严重变形的情况下，无需进行大量培训或细化即可实现稳健的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层学习和门控最优传输的形状匹配方法，用于处理存在严重变形的网格间密集对应关系预测。
AI.motivation: 现有形状匹配方法或依赖局部点描述或全局形状信息，难以同时捕捉局部细节与全局结构，且在严重变形下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计分层学习框架融合局部补丁特征与全局结构信息，并提出递归更新非自信节点特征的门控最优传输求解器以学习全局一致对应关系。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，方法在严重变形情况下无需大量训练或优化即可保持稳定匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层表示与门控最优传输结合有效提升了形状匹配的鲁棒性，为复杂变形场景提供了无需精细调参的解决方案。

method: 设计分层学习框架融合局部补丁特征与全局结构信息，并提出递归更新非自信节点特征的门控最优传输求解器以学习全局一致对应关系。
result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，方法在严重变形情况下无需大量训练或优化即可保持稳定匹配性能。
conclusion: 分层表示与门控最优传输结合有效提升了形状匹配的鲁棒性，为复杂变形场景提供了无需精细调参的解决方案。
search_text: Bending Graphs: Hierarchical Shape Matching using Gated Optimal Transport 弯曲图：使用门控最优传输的分层形状匹配 Shape matching has been a long-studied problem for the computer graphics and vision community. The objective is to predict a dense correspondence between meshes that have a certain degree of deformation. Existing methods either consider the local description of sampled points or discover correspondences based on global shape information. In this work, we investigate a hierarchical learning design, to which we incorporate local patch-level information and global shape-level structures. This flexible representation enables correspondence prediction and provides rich features for the matching stage. Finally, we propose a novel optimal transport solver by recurrently updating features on non-confident nodes to learn globally consistent correspondences between the shapes. Our results on publicly available datasets suggest robust performance in presence of severe deformations without the need for extensive training or refinement. 形状匹配一直是计算机图形和视觉界长期研究的问题。目标是预测具有一定变形程度的网格之间的密集对应关系。现有的方法要么考虑采样点的局部描述，要么根据全局形状信息发现对应关系。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种分层学习设计，其中结合了局部补丁级信息和全局形状级结构。这种灵活的表示可以实现对应预测，并为匹配阶段提供丰富的特征。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的最佳传输求解器，通过反复更新非置信节点上的特征来学习形状之间的全局一致对应关系。我们对公开数据集的结果表明，在存在严重变形的情况下，无需进行大量培训或细化即可实现稳健的性能。 本文提出一种基于分层学习和门控最优传输的形状匹配方法，用于处理存在严重变形的网格间密集对应关系预测。 Mahdi Saleh,Shun-Cheng Wu,Luca Cosmo,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.CG,cs.GR

authors_text: Ibrahim Abdul Majeed,Sagar Kaushik,Aniruddha Bardhan,Venkata Siva Kumar Tadi,Hwang-Ki Min,Karthikeyan Kumaraguru,Rajasekhara Duvvuru Muni
title: Comparative assessment of federated and centralized machine learning
title_zh: 联合和集中式机器学习的比较评估
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a privacy preserving machine learning scheme, where training happens with data federated across devices and not leaving them to sustain user privacy. This is ensured by making the untrained or partially trained models to reach directly the individual devices and getting locally trained "on-device" using the device owned data, and the server aggregating all the partially trained model learnings to update a global model. Although almost all the model learning schemes in the federated learning setup use gradient descent, there are certain characteristic differences brought about by the non-IID nature of the data availability, that affects the training in comparison to the centralized schemes. In this paper, we discuss the various factors that affect the federated learning training, because of the non-IID distributed nature of the data, as well as the inherent differences in the federating learning approach as against the typical centralized gradient descent techniques. We empirically demonstrate the effect of number of samples per device and the distribution of output labels on federated learning. In addition to the privacy advantage we seek through federated learning, we also study if there is a cost advantage while using federated learning frameworks. We show that federated learning does have an advantage in cost when the model sizes to be trained are not reasonably large. All in all, we present the need for careful design of model for both performance and cost.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a privacy preserving machine learning scheme, where training happens with data federated across devices and not leaving them to sustain user privacy. This is ensured by making the untrained or partially trained models to reach directly the individual devices and getting locally trained "on-device" using the device owned data, and the server aggregating all the partially trained model learnings to update a global model. Although almost all the model learning schemes in the federated learning setup use gradient descent, there are certain characteristic differences brought about by the non-IID nature of the data availability, that affects the training in comparison to the centralized schemes. In this paper, we discuss the various factors that affect the federated learning training, because of the non-IID distributed nature of the data, as well as the inherent differences in the federating learning approach as against the typical centralized gradient descent techniques. We empirically demonstrate the effect of number of samples per device and the distribution of output labels on federated learning. In addition to the privacy advantage we seek through federated learning, we also study if there is a cost advantage while using federated learning frameworks. We show that federated learning does have an advantage in cost when the model sizes to be trained are not reasonably large. All in all, we present the need for careful design of model for both performance and cost.
abstract_zh: 联合学习 (FL) 是一种隐私保护机器学习方案，其中训练是通过跨设备联合数据进行的，而不是让它们维护用户隐私。这是通过使未经训练或部分训练的模型直接到达各个设备并使用设备拥有的数据进行本地训练“设备上”以及服务器聚合所有部分训练的模型学习来更新全局模型来确保的。尽管联邦学习设置中几乎所有模型学习方案都使用梯度下降，但与集中式方案相比，数据可用性的非独立同分布性质带来了某些特征差异，这影响了训练。在本文中，我们讨论了影响联邦学习训练的各种因素，因为数据的非独立同分布特性，以及联邦学习方法与典型的集中式梯度下降技术的固有差异。我们凭经验证明了每个设备的样本数量和输出标签的分布对联邦学习的影响。除了我们通过联邦学习寻求的隐私优势之外，我们还研究使用联邦学习框架时是否存在成本优势。我们表明，当要训练的模型大小不是相当大时，联邦学习确实在成本方面具有优势。总而言之，我们提出需要针对性能和成本仔细设计模型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了联邦学习与集中式机器学习的优劣，探讨了非独立同分布数据对联邦学习训练的影响，并分析了联邦学习在成本和性能方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在保护用户隐私方面具有优势，但其训练效果和成本效益尚未被充分研究，尤其是在非独立同分布数据环境下。
AI.method: 通过实证方法分析了设备样本数量和输出标签分布对联邦学习的影响，并对比了联邦学习与集中式学习的训练成本。
AI.result: 联邦学习在模型规模适中时具有成本优势，并且非独立同分布数据对联邦学习的训练效果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习在隐私保护和成本效益方面具有一定优势，但需要在模型设计上兼顾性能与成本，以实现最佳效果。

authors_text: Zonghang Li,Yihong He,Hongfang Yu,Jiawen Kang,Xiaoping Li,Zenglin Xu,Dusit Niyato
title: Data Heterogeneity-Robust Federated Learning via Group Client Selection in Industrial IoT
title_zh: 工业物联网中的数据异构性-通过组客户端选择实现鲁棒联邦学习
abstract: Nowadays, the industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) has played an integral role in Industry 4.0 and produced massive amounts of data for industrial intelligence. These data locate on decentralized devices in modern factories. To protect the confidentiality of industrial data, federated learning (FL) was introduced to collaboratively train shared machine learning models. However, the local data collected by different devices skew in class distribution and degrade industrial FL performance. This challenge has been widely studied at the mobile edge, but they ignored the rapidly changing streaming data and clustering nature of factory devices, and more seriously, they may threaten data security. In this paper, we propose FedGS, which is a hierarchical cloud-edge-end FL framework for 5G empowered industries, to improve industrial FL performance on non-i.i.d. data. Taking advantage of naturally clustered factory devices, FedGS uses a gradient-based binary permutation algorithm (GBP-CS) to select a subset of devices within each factory and build homogeneous super nodes participating in FL training. Then, we propose a compound-step synchronization protocol to coordinate the training process within and among these super nodes, which shows great robustness against data heterogeneity. The proposed methods are time-efficient and can adapt to dynamic environments, without exposing confidential industrial data in risky manipulation. We prove that FedGS has better convergence performance than FedAvg and give a relaxed condition under which FedGS is more communication-efficient. Extensive experiments show that FedGS improves accuracy by 3.5% and reduces training rounds by 59% on average, confirming its superior effectiveness and efficiency on non-i.i.d. data.
summary: Nowadays, the industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) has played an integral role in Industry 4.0 and produced massive amounts of data for industrial intelligence. These data locate on decentralized devices in modern factories. To protect the confidentiality of industrial data, federated learning (FL) was introduced to collaboratively train shared machine learning models. However, the local data collected by different devices skew in class distribution and degrade industrial FL performance. This challenge has been widely studied at the mobile edge, but they ignored the rapidly changing streaming data and clustering nature of factory devices, and more seriously, they may threaten data security. In this paper, we propose FedGS, which is a hierarchical cloud-edge-end FL framework for 5G empowered industries, to improve industrial FL performance on non-i.i.d. data. Taking advantage of naturally clustered factory devices, FedGS uses a gradient-based binary permutation algorithm (GBP-CS) to select a subset of devices within each factory and build homogeneous super nodes participating in FL training. Then, we propose a compound-step synchronization protocol to coordinate the training process within and among these super nodes, which shows great robustness against data heterogeneity. The proposed methods are time-efficient and can adapt to dynamic environments, without exposing confidential industrial data in risky manipulation. We prove that FedGS has better convergence performance than FedAvg and give a relaxed condition under which FedGS is more communication-efficient. Extensive experiments show that FedGS improves accuracy by 3.5% and reduces training rounds by 59% on average, confirming its superior effectiveness and efficiency on non-i.i.d. data.
abstract_zh: 如今，工业物联网（IIoT）在工业4.0中发挥着不可或缺的作用，为工业智能产生了大量数据。这些数据位于现代工厂的分散设备上。为了保护工业数据的机密性，引入了联邦学习（FL）来协作训练共享机器学习模型。然而，不同设备收集的本地数据在类别分布上存在偏差，并降低了工业 FL 性能。这一挑战已在移动边缘得到了广泛研究，但他们忽略了工厂设备快速变化的流数据和集群性质，更严重的是，它们可能会威胁数据安全。在本文中，我们提出了 FedGS，它是一个面向 5G 赋能行业的分层云边端 FL 框架，旨在提高非独立同分布的工业 FL 性能。数据。利用自然集群的工厂设备的优势，FedGS 使用基于梯度的二进制排列算法 (GBP-CS) 选择每个工厂内的设备子集，并构建参与 FL 训练的同构超级节点。然后，我们提出了一种复合步骤同步协议来协调这些超级节点内部和之间的训练过程，该协议对数据异构性表现出很强的鲁棒性。所提出的方法具有时效性，并且可以适应动态环境，而不会在危险的操作中暴露机密的工业数据。我们证明 FedGS 比 FedAvg 具有更好的收敛性能，并给出了一个宽松的条件，在该条件下 FedGS 的通信效率更高。大量实验表明，FedGS 的准确率平均提高了 3.5%，训练轮次减少了 59%，证实了其在非独立同分布上的卓越有效性和效率。数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedGS框架，通过分组客户端选择和同步协议提升工业物联网中非独立同分布数据下的联邦学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了工业场景中数据流特性与设备聚类性，导致模型性能下降且存在数据安全隐患。
AI.method: 构建云-边-端分层架构，采用基于梯度的二进制排列算法选择设备构建同质超节点，并设计复合步长同步协议协调训练过程。
AI.result: 在非独立同分布数据下准确率提升3.5%，训练轮次减少59%，证明其收敛性与通信效率优势。
AI.conclusion: FedGS通过设备聚类与动态同步机制有效应对工业数据异质性，在保证安全性的前提下提升联邦学习效率。

The proposed methods are time-efficient and can adapt to dynamic environments, without exposing confidential industrial data in risky manipulation. Extensive experiments show that FedGS improves accuracy by 3.5% and reduces training rounds by 59% on average, confirming its superior effectiveness and efficiency on non-i.i.d. data. 如今，工业物联网（IIoT）在工业4.0中发挥着不可或缺的作用，为工业智能产生了大量数据。这些数据位于现代工厂的分散设备上。为了保护工业数据的机密性，引入了联邦学习（FL）来协作训练共享机器学习模型。然而，不同设备收集的本地数据在类别分布上存在偏差，并降低了工业 FL 性能。这一挑战已在移动边缘得到了广泛研究，但他们忽略了工厂设备快速变化的流数据和集群性质，更严重的是，它们可能会威胁数据安全。在本文中，我们提出了 FedGS，它是一个面向 5G 赋能行业的分层云边端 FL 框架，旨在提高非独立同分布的工业 FL 性能。数据。利用自然集群的工厂设备的优势，FedGS 使用基于梯度的二进制排列算法 (GBP-CS) 选择每个工厂内的设备子集，并构建参与 FL 训练的同构超级节点。然后，我们提出了一种复合步骤同步协议来协调这些超级节点内部和之间的训练过程，该协议对数据异构性表现出很强的鲁棒性。所提出的方法具有时效性，并且可以适应动态环境，而不会在危险的操作中暴露机密的工业数据。我们证明 FedGS 比 FedAvg 具有更好的收敛性能，并给出了一个宽松的条件，在该条件下 FedGS 的通信效率更高。大量实验表明，FedGS 的准确率平均提高了 3.5%，训练轮次减少了 59%，证实了其在非独立同分布上的卓越有效性和效率。数据。 本文提出FedGS框架，通过分组客户端选择和同步协议提升工业物联网中非独立同分布数据下的联邦学习性能。 Zonghang Li,Yihong He,Hongfang Yu,Jiawen Kang,Xiaoping Li,Zenglin Xu,Dusit Niyato cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Shanshan Wang,Ruoyou Wu,Cheng Li,Juan Zou,Ziyao Zhang,Qiegen Liu,Yan Xi,Hairong Zheng
title: PARCEL: Physics-based Unsupervised Contrastive Representation Learning for Multi-coil MR Imaging
title_zh: PARCEL：基于物理的多线圈 MR 成像无监督对比表示学习
abstract: With the successful application of deep learning to magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, parallel imaging techniques based on neural networks have attracted wide attention. However, in the absence of high-quality, fully sampled datasets for training, the performance of these methods is limited. And the interpretability of models is not strong enough. To tackle this issue, this paper proposes a Physics-bAsed unsupeRvised Contrastive rEpresentation Learning (PARCEL) method to speed up parallel MR imaging. Specifically, PARCEL has a parallel framework to contrastively learn two branches of model-based unrolling networks from augmented undersampled multi-coil k-space data. A sophisticated co-training loss with three essential components has been designed to guide the two networks in capturing the inherent features and representations for MR images. And the final MR image is reconstructed with the trained contrastive networks. PARCEL was evaluated on two vivo datasets and compared to five state-of-the-art methods. The results show that PARCEL is able to learn essential representations for accurate MR reconstruction without relying on fully sampled datasets.
summary: With the successful application of deep learning to magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, parallel imaging techniques based on neural networks have attracted wide attention. However, in the absence of high-quality, fully sampled datasets for training, the performance of these methods is limited. And the interpretability of models is not strong enough. To tackle this issue, this paper proposes a Physics-bAsed unsupeRvised Contrastive rEpresentation Learning (PARCEL) method to speed up parallel MR imaging. Specifically, PARCEL has a parallel framework to contrastively learn two branches of model-based unrolling networks from augmented undersampled multi-coil k-space data. A sophisticated co-training loss with three essential components has been designed to guide the two networks in capturing the inherent features and representations for MR images. And the final MR image is reconstructed with the trained contrastive networks. PARCEL was evaluated on two vivo datasets and compared to five state-of-the-art methods. The results show that PARCEL is able to learn essential representations for accurate MR reconstruction without relying on fully sampled datasets.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在磁共振（MR）成像中的成功应用，基于神经网络的并行成像技术引起了广泛的关注。然而，在缺乏高质量、完全采样的训练数据集的情况下，这些方法的性能受到限制。而且模型的可解释性还不够强。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于物理的无监督对比表征学习（PARCEL）方法来加速并行 MR 成像。具体来说，PARCEL 有一个并行框架，可以从增强欠采样多线圈 k 空间数据中对比学习基于模型的展开网络的两个分支。设计了具有三个基本组成部分的复杂协同训练损失，以指导两个网络捕获 MR 图像的固有特征和表示。最终的 MR 图像是用经过训练的对比网络重建的。 PARCEL 在两个体内数据集上进行了评估，并与五种最先进的方法进行了比较。结果表明，PARCEL 能够学习准确 MR 重建的基本表示，而无需依赖完全采样的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理的无监督对比表示学习方法PARCEL，用于加速多线圈磁共振成像。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在缺乏高质量全采样数据集时性能受限，且模型可解释性不足，需开发无需全采样数据的物理引导学习方法。
AI.method: 构建并行框架对比学习两个基于模型展开的网络分支，设计包含三个核心组件的协同训练损失函数，从欠采样的多线圈k空间数据中学习MR图像本质特征。
AI.result: 在两个活体数据集上验证，PARCEL在无需全采样数据情况下实现了准确的MR重建，优于五种最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PARCEL通过物理约束的对比学习有效捕捉MR图像关键特征，为无监督医学影像重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jeffrey Delmerico,Roi Poranne,Federica Bogo,Helen Oleynikova,Eric Vollenweider,Stelian Coros,Juan Nieto,Marc Pollefeys
title: Spatial Computing and Intuitive Interaction: Bringing Mixed Reality and Robotics Together
title_zh: 空间计算和直观交互：将混合现实和机器人技术结合在一起
abstract: Spatial computing -- the ability of devices to be aware of their surroundings and to represent this digitally -- offers novel capabilities in human-robot interaction. In particular, the combination of spatial computing and egocentric sensing on mixed reality devices enables them to capture and understand human actions and translate these to actions with spatial meaning, which offers exciting new possibilities for collaboration between humans and robots. This paper presents several human-robot systems that utilize these capabilities to enable novel robot use cases: mission planning for inspection, gesture-based control, and immersive teleoperation. These works demonstrate the power of mixed reality as a tool for human-robot interaction, and the potential of spatial computing and mixed reality to drive the future of human-robot interaction.
summary: Spatial computing -- the ability of devices to be aware of their surroundings and to represent this digitally -- offers novel capabilities in human-robot interaction. In particular, the combination of spatial computing and egocentric sensing on mixed reality devices enables them to capture and understand human actions and translate these to actions with spatial meaning, which offers exciting new possibilities for collaboration between humans and robots. This paper presents several human-robot systems that utilize these capabilities to enable novel robot use cases: mission planning for inspection, gesture-based control, and immersive teleoperation. These works demonstrate the power of mixed reality as a tool for human-robot interaction, and the potential of spatial computing and mixed reality to drive the future of human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 空间计算——设备感知周围环境并以数字方式表示的能力——为人机交互提供了新颖的功能。特别是，混合现实设备上的空间计算和以自我为中心的感知相结合，使它们能够捕捉和理解人类行为，并将这些行为转化为具有空间意义的行为，这为人类和机器人之间的协作提供了令人兴奋的新可能性。本文介绍了几种利用这些功能来实现新颖的机器人用例的人机系统：检查任务规划、基于手势的控制和沉浸式远程操作。这些作品展示了混合现实作为人机交互工具的力量，以及空间计算和混合现实推动人机交互未来的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合空间计算与混合现实技术，开发了多种新型人机协作系统，包括任务规划、手势控制和沉浸式远程操作，以提升人机交互的直观性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统人机交互方式存在局限性，而空间计算与混合现实技术能更直观地捕捉人类行为并转化为机器人可理解的指令，从而增强协作能力。
AI.method: 利用混合现实设备的自我中心感知技术，结合空间计算能力，捕捉并解析人类动作，将其转化为具有空间意义的机器人指令，实现多场景交互。
AI.result: 展示了三个应用案例（任务规划、手势控制、沉浸式远程操作），验证了混合现实作为人机交互工具的有效性，以及空间计算技术的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 空间计算与混合现实的结合为未来人机交互提供了创新方向，能够推动更自然、高效的机器人协作模式发展。

authors_text: Francesca Ronchini,Romain Serizel
title: A benchmark of state-of-the-art sound event detection systems evaluated on synthetic soundscapes
title_zh: 在合成音景上评估的最先进声音事件检测系统的基准
comment: ef:ICASSP 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ef:ICASSP 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: This paper proposes a benchmark of submissions to Detection and Classification Acoustic Scene and Events 2021 Challenge (DCASE) Task 4 representing a sampling of the state-of-the-art in Sound Event Detection task. The submissions are evaluated according to the two polyphonic sound detection score scenarios proposed for the DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 4, which allow to make an analysis on whether submissions are designed to perform fine-grained temporal segmentation, coarse-grained temporal segmentation, or have been designed to be polyvalent on the scenarios proposed. We study the solutions proposed by participants to analyze their robustness to varying level target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and to temporal localization of target sound events. A last experiment is proposed in order to study the impact of non-target events on systems outputs. Results show that systems adapted to provide coarse segmentation outputs are more robust to different target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and, with the help of specific data augmentation methods, they are more robust to time localization of the original event. Results of the last experiment display that systems tend to spuriously predict short events when non-target events are present. This is particularly true for systems that are tailored to have a fine segmentation.
summary: This paper proposes a benchmark of submissions to Detection and Classification Acoustic Scene and Events 2021 Challenge (DCASE) Task 4 representing a sampling of the state-of-the-art in Sound Event Detection task. The submissions are evaluated according to the two polyphonic sound detection score scenarios proposed for the DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 4, which allow to make an analysis on whether submissions are designed to perform fine-grained temporal segmentation, coarse-grained temporal segmentation, or have been designed to be polyvalent on the scenarios proposed. We study the solutions proposed by participants to analyze their robustness to varying level target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and to temporal localization of target sound events. A last experiment is proposed in order to study the impact of non-target events on systems outputs. Results show that systems adapted to provide coarse segmentation outputs are more robust to different target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and, with the help of specific data augmentation methods, they are more robust to time localization of the original event. Results of the last experiment display that systems tend to spuriously predict short events when non-target events are present. This is particularly true for systems that are tailored to have a fine segmentation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 2021 年检测和分类声学场景和事件挑战 (DCASE) 任务 4 的提交基准，代表了声音事件检测任务中最先进的样本。根据为 DCASE 2021 挑战任务 4 提出的两个和弦声音检测得分场景对提交的内容进行评估，这允许分析提交的内容是否被设计用于执行细粒度时间分割、粗粒度时间分割，或者是否被设计为对所提出的场景进行多价处理。我们研究参与者提出的解决方案，以分析其对不同级别的目标与非目标信噪比以及目标声音事件的时间定位的鲁棒性。提出最后一个实验是为了研究非目标事件对系统输出的影响。结果表明，适合提供粗分割输出的系统对于不同的目标与非目标信噪比更加鲁棒，并且在特定的数据增强方法的帮助下，它们对于原始事件的时间定位更加鲁棒。上次实验的结果表明，当存在非目标事件时，系统往往会错误地预测短事件。对于专门为进行精细分段而定制的系统尤其如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DCASE 2021挑战赛任务4提交方案的声事件检测系统基准测试，评估其在合成声景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 分析现有声事件检测系统在不同信号噪声比和时间定位条件下的鲁棒性，并研究非目标事件对系统输出的影响。
AI.method: 通过两种多声源检测评分场景评估参赛方案，分析其在细粒度/粗粒度时间分割及多场景适应性；测试不同信噪比、时间定位和非目标事件干扰下的系统表现。
AI.result: 粗粒度分割系统对信噪比和时间定位更鲁棒，特定数据增强方法可提升其性能；非目标事件存在时，细粒度系统易产生短时误检。
AI.conclusion: 粗粒度分割方法在复杂场景下更具优势，数据增强可提升鲁棒性，需关注非目标事件对细粒度检测的干扰问题。

search_text: A benchmark of state-of-the-art sound event detection systems evaluated on synthetic soundscapes 在合成音景上评估的最先进声音事件检测系统的基准 This paper proposes a benchmark of submissions to Detection and Classification Acoustic Scene and Events 2021 Challenge (DCASE) Task 4 representing a sampling of the state-of-the-art in Sound Event Detection task. The submissions are evaluated according to the two polyphonic sound detection score scenarios proposed for the DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 4, which allow to make an analysis on whether submissions are designed to perform fine-grained temporal segmentation, coarse-grained temporal segmentation, or have been designed to be polyvalent on the scenarios proposed. We study the solutions proposed by participants to analyze their robustness to varying level target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and to temporal localization of target sound events. A last experiment is proposed in order to study the impact of non-target events on systems outputs. Results show that systems adapted to provide coarse segmentation outputs are more robust to different target to non-target signal-to-noise ratio and, with the help of specific data augmentation methods, they are more robust to time localization of the original event. Results of the last experiment display that systems tend to spuriously predict short events when non-target events are present. This is particularly true for systems that are tailored to have a fine segmentation. 本文提出了 2021 年检测和分类声学场景和事件挑战 (DCASE) 任务 4 的提交基准，代表了声音事件检测任务中最先进的样本。根据为 DCASE 2021 挑战任务 4 提出的两个和弦声音检测得分场景对提交的内容进行评估，这允许分析提交的内容是否被设计用于执行细粒度时间分割、粗粒度时间分割，或者是否被设计为对所提出的场景进行多价处理。我们研究参与者提出的解决方案，以分析其对不同级别的目标与非目标信噪比以及目标声音事件的时间定位的鲁棒性。提出最后一个实验是为了研究非目标事件对系统输出的影响。结果表明，适合提供粗分割输出的系统对于不同的目标与非目标信噪比更加鲁棒，并且在特定的数据增强方法的帮助下，它们对于原始事件的时间定位更加鲁棒。上次实验的结果表明，当存在非目标事件时，系统往往会错误地预测短事件。对于专门为进行精细分段而定制的系统尤其如此。 本文提出了一种基于DCASE 2021挑战赛任务4提交方案的声事件检测系统基准测试，评估其在合成声景中的性能。 Francesca Ronchini,Romain Serizel eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Pu Zhang,Lei Bai,Jianru Xue,Jianwu Fang,Nanning Zheng,Wanli Ouyang
title: Trajectory Forecasting from Detection with Uncertainty-Aware Motion Encoding
title_zh: 通过不确定性感知运动编码进行检测的轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory forecasting is critical for autonomous platforms to make safe planning and actions. Currently, most trajectory forecasting methods assume that object trajectories have been extracted and directly develop trajectory predictors based on the ground truth trajectories. However, this assumption does not hold in practical situations. Trajectories obtained from object detection and tracking are inevitably noisy, which could cause serious forecasting errors to predictors built on ground truth trajectories. In this paper, we propose a trajectory predictor directly based on detection results without relying on explicitly formed trajectories. Different from the traditional methods which encode the motion cue of an agent based on its clearly defined trajectory, we extract the motion information only based on the affinity cues among detection results, in which an affinity-aware state update mechanism is designed to take the uncertainty of association into account. In addition, considering that there could be multiple plausible matching candidates, we aggregate the states of them. This design relaxes the undesirable effect of noisy trajectory obtained from data association. Extensive ablation experiments validate the effectiveness of our method and its generalization ability on different detectors. Cross-comparison to other forecasting schemes further proves the superiority of our method. Code will be released upon acceptance.
summary: Trajectory forecasting is critical for autonomous platforms to make safe planning and actions. Currently, most trajectory forecasting methods assume that object trajectories have been extracted and directly develop trajectory predictors based on the ground truth trajectories. However, this assumption does not hold in practical situations. Trajectories obtained from object detection and tracking are inevitably noisy, which could cause serious forecasting errors to predictors built on ground truth trajectories. In this paper, we propose a trajectory predictor directly based on detection results without relying on explicitly formed trajectories. Different from the traditional methods which encode the motion cue of an agent based on its clearly defined trajectory, we extract the motion information only based on the affinity cues among detection results, in which an affinity-aware state update mechanism is designed to take the uncertainty of association into account. In addition, considering that there could be multiple plausible matching candidates, we aggregate the states of them. This design relaxes the undesirable effect of noisy trajectory obtained from data association. Extensive ablation experiments validate the effectiveness of our method and its generalization ability on different detectors. Cross-comparison to other forecasting schemes further proves the superiority of our method. Code will be released upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测对于自主平台制定安全规划和行动至关重要。目前，大多数轨迹预测方法都假设目标轨迹已被提取，并直接基于地面真实轨迹开发轨迹预测器。然而，这个假设在实际情况中并不成立。从对象检测和跟踪获得的轨迹不可避免地存在噪声，这可能会对基于地面真实轨迹的预测器造成严重的预测错误。在本文中，我们提出了一种直接基于检测结果的轨迹预测器，而不依赖于显式形成的轨迹。与基于明确定义的轨迹对智能体的运动线索进行编码的传统方法不同，我们仅根据检测结果之间的亲和力线索来提取运动信息，其中设计了亲和力感知状态更新机制来考虑关联的不确定性。此外，考虑到可能存在多个看似合理的匹配候选者，我们汇总了它们的状态。这种设计减轻了从数据关联获得的噪声轨迹的不良影响。广泛的消融实验验证了我们的方法的有效性及其在不同探测器上的泛化能力。与其他预测方案的交叉比较进一步证明了我们方法的优越性。代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需显式轨迹的轨迹预测方法，直接基于检测结果并考虑关联不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法依赖可能含噪声的显式轨迹，导致预测误差，需直接利用检测结果并处理不确定性。
AI.method: 基于检测结果的关联线索提取运动信息，设计不确定性感知状态更新机制，并聚合多候选状态以缓解噪声影响。
AI.result: 实验验证方法有效性与泛化能力，跨方案对比证明其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过处理检测关联不确定性，有效提升轨迹预测准确性，适用于多种检测器。

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Xue Pang,Yongjing Ni,Haipeng Yao,Xin Li
title: A multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm with delay prediction
title_zh: 一种具有延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法
abstract: Virtual network embedding (VNE) is an crucial part of network virtualization (NV), which aims to map the virtual networks (VNs) to a shared substrate network (SN). With the emergence of various delay-sensitive applications, how to improve the delay performance of the system has become a hot topic in academic circles. Based on extensive research, we proposed a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm based on delay prediction (DP-VNE). Firstly, the candidate physical nodes are selected by estimating the delay of virtual requests, then particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm is used to optimize the mapping process, so as to reduce the delay of the system. The simulation results show that compared with the other three advanced algorithms, the proposed algorithm can significantly reduce the system delay while keeping other indicators unaffected.
summary: Virtual network embedding (VNE) is an crucial part of network virtualization (NV), which aims to map the virtual networks (VNs) to a shared substrate network (SN). With the emergence of various delay-sensitive applications, how to improve the delay performance of the system has become a hot topic in academic circles. Based on extensive research, we proposed a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm based on delay prediction (DP-VNE). Firstly, the candidate physical nodes are selected by estimating the delay of virtual requests, then particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm is used to optimize the mapping process, so as to reduce the delay of the system. The simulation results show that compared with the other three advanced algorithms, the proposed algorithm can significantly reduce the system delay while keeping other indicators unaffected.
abstract_zh: 虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）是网络虚拟化（NV）的重要组成部分，其目的是将虚拟网络（VN）映射到共享底层网络（SN）。随着各种时延敏感应用的出现，如何提高系统的时延性能成为学术界的热点话题。基于广泛的研究，我们提出了一种基于延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（DP-VNE）。首先通过估计虚拟请求的延迟来选择候选物理节点，然后利用粒子群优化（PSO）算法优化映射过程，从而降低系统的延迟。仿真结果表明，与其他三种先进算法相比，该算法能够在其他指标不受影响的情况下显着降低系统延迟。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法，以优化映射过程并降低系统延迟。
AI.motivation: 随着延迟敏感应用的增多，现有VNE算法在延迟优化方面存在不足，需提出更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用延迟预测选择候选物理节点，并结合粒子群优化（PSO）算法优化映射过程。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该算法在降低系统延迟方面优于其他三种先进算法，且不影响其他性能指标。
AI.conclusion: DP-VNE算法有效提升了多域虚拟网络嵌入的延迟性能，适用于需要低延迟的场景。

result: 仿真结果表明，该算法在降低系统延迟方面优于其他三种先进算法，且不影响其他性能指标。
conclusion: DP-VNE算法有效提升了多域虚拟网络嵌入的延迟性能，适用于需要低延迟的场景。
search_text: A multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm with delay prediction 一种具有延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法 Virtual network embedding (VNE) is an crucial part of network virtualization (NV), which aims to map the virtual networks (VNs) to a shared substrate network (SN). With the emergence of various delay-sensitive applications, how to improve the delay performance of the system has become a hot topic in academic circles. Based on extensive research, we proposed a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm based on delay prediction (DP-VNE). Firstly, the candidate physical nodes are selected by estimating the delay of virtual requests, then particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm is used to optimize the mapping process, so as to reduce the delay of the system. The simulation results show that compared with the other three advanced algorithms, the proposed algorithm can significantly reduce the system delay while keeping other indicators unaffected. 虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）是网络虚拟化（NV）的重要组成部分，其目的是将虚拟网络（VN）映射到共享底层网络（SN）。随着各种时延敏感应用的出现，如何提高系统的时延性能成为学术界的热点话题。基于广泛的研究，我们提出了一种基于延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（DP-VNE）。首先通过估计虚拟请求的延迟来选择候选物理节点，然后利用粒子群优化（PSO）算法优化映射过程，从而降低系统的延迟。仿真结果表明，与其他三种先进算法相比，该算法能够在其他指标不受影响的情况下显着降低系统延迟。 提出一种基于延迟预测的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法，以优化映射过程并降低系统延迟。 Peiying Zhang,Xue Pang,Yongjing Ni,Haipeng Yao,Xin Li cs.NI,cs.AI

authors_text: Guangkai Xu,Wei Yin,Hao Chen,Chunhua Shen,Kai Cheng,Feng Wu,Feng Zhao
title: Towards 3D Scene Reconstruction from Locally Scale-Aligned Monocular Video Depth
title_zh: 从局部尺度对齐的单目视频深度实现 3D 场景重建
abstract: Existing monocular depth estimation methods have achieved excellent robustness in diverse scenes, but they can only retrieve affine-invariant depth, up to an unknown scale and shift. However, in some video-based scenarios such as video depth estimation and 3D scene reconstruction from a video, the unknown scale and shift residing in per-frame prediction may cause the depth inconsistency. To solve this problem, we propose a locally weighted linear regression method to recover the scale and shift with very sparse anchor points, which ensures the scale consistency along consecutive frames. Extensive experiments show that our method can boost the performance of existing state-of-the-art approaches by 50% at most over several zero-shot benchmarks. Besides, we merge over 6.3 million RGBD images to train strong and robust depth models. Our produced ResNet50-backbone model even outperforms the state-of-the-art DPT ViT-Large model. Combining with geometry-based reconstruction methods, we formulate a new dense 3D scene reconstruction pipeline, which benefits from both the scale consistency of sparse points and the robustness of monocular methods. By performing the simple per-frame prediction over a video, the accurate 3D scene shape can be recovered.
summary: Existing monocular depth estimation methods have achieved excellent robustness in diverse scenes, but they can only retrieve affine-invariant depth, up to an unknown scale and shift. However, in some video-based scenarios such as video depth estimation and 3D scene reconstruction from a video, the unknown scale and shift residing in per-frame prediction may cause the depth inconsistency. To solve this problem, we propose a locally weighted linear regression method to recover the scale and shift with very sparse anchor points, which ensures the scale consistency along consecutive frames. Extensive experiments show that our method can boost the performance of existing state-of-the-art approaches by 50% at most over several zero-shot benchmarks. Besides, we merge over 6.3 million RGBD images to train strong and robust depth models. Our produced ResNet50-backbone model even outperforms the state-of-the-art DPT ViT-Large model. Combining with geometry-based reconstruction methods, we formulate a new dense 3D scene reconstruction pipeline, which benefits from both the scale consistency of sparse points and the robustness of monocular methods. By performing the simple per-frame prediction over a video, the accurate 3D scene shape can be recovered.
abstract_zh: 现有的单目深度估计方法在不同场景中实现了出色的鲁棒性，但它们只能检索仿射不变深度，达到未知的尺度和位移。然而，在一些基于视频的场景中，例如视频深度估计和视频的 3D 场景重建，每帧预测中存在的未知尺度和偏移可能会导致深度不一致。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种局部加权线性回归方法，用非常稀疏的锚点来恢复尺度和位移，这确保了连续帧的尺度一致性。大量实验表明，与几个零样本基准测试相比，我们的方法最多可以将现有最先进方法的性能提高 50%。此外，我们合并了超过 630 万张 RGBD 图像来训练强大且鲁棒的深度模型。我们生产的 ResNet50 主干模型甚至优于最先进的 DPT ViT-Large 模型。结合基于几何的重建方法，我们制定了一种新的密集 3D 场景重建管道，该管道同时受益于稀疏点的尺度一致性和单目方法的鲁棒性。通过对视频执行简单的每帧预测，可以恢复准确的 3D 场景形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部尺度对齐的单目视频深度估计方法，用于解决3D场景重建中的尺度和偏移不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法无法消除帧间尺度和偏移差异，导致视频场景中深度预测不一致，影响3D重建效果。
AI.method: 采用局部加权线性回归方法，通过稀疏锚点恢复尺度和偏移，并融合630万RGBD图像训练深度模型，结合几何重建方法构建新管道。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中提升现有方法性能最高达50%，ResNet50模型超越DPT ViT-Large，实现视频帧级预测的精确3D场景重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视频深度估计中的尺度一致性问题，为单目视频的3D场景重建提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

However, in some video-based scenarios such as video depth estimation and 3D scene reconstruction from a video, the unknown scale and shift residing in per-frame prediction may cause the depth inconsistency. To solve this problem, we propose a locally weighted linear regression method to recover the scale and shift with very sparse anchor points, which ensures the scale consistency along consecutive frames. Extensive experiments show that our method can boost the performance of existing state-of-the-art approaches by 50% at most over several zero-shot benchmarks. Besides, we merge over 6.3 million RGBD images to train strong and robust depth models. Our produced ResNet50-backbone model even outperforms the state-of-the-art DPT ViT-Large model. Combining with geometry-based reconstruction methods, we formulate a new dense 3D scene reconstruction pipeline, which benefits from both the scale consistency of sparse points and the robustness of monocular methods. authors_text: Dixant Mittal,Siddharth Aravindan,Wee Sun Lee
title: ExPoSe: Combining State-Based Exploration with Gradient-Based Online Search
title_zh: ExPoSe：将基于状态的探索与基于梯度的在线搜索相结合
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
abstract: Online tree-based search algorithms iteratively simulate trajectories and update action-values for a set of states stored in a tree structure. It works reasonably well in practice but fails to effectively utilise the information gathered from similar states. Depending upon the smoothness of the action-value function, one approach to overcoming this issue is through online learning, where information is interpolated among similar states; Policy Gradient Search provides a practical algorithm to achieve this. However, Policy Gradient Search lacks an explicit exploration mechanism, which is a key feature of tree-based online search algorithms. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective online search algorithm called Exploratory Policy Gradient Search (ExPoSe), which leverages information sharing among states by updating the search policy parameters directly, while incorporating a well-defined exploration mechanism during the online search process. We evaluate ExPoSe on a range of decision-making problems, including Atari games, Sokoban, and Hamiltonian cycle search in sparse graphs. The results demonstrate that ExPoSe consistently outperforms other popular online search algorithms across all domains. The ExPoSe source code is available at \textit{\url{https://github.com/dixantmittal/ExPoSe}}.
summary: Online tree-based search algorithms iteratively simulate trajectories and update action-values for a set of states stored in a tree structure. It works reasonably well in practice but fails to effectively utilise the information gathered from similar states. Depending upon the smoothness of the action-value function, one approach to overcoming this issue is through online learning, where information is interpolated among similar states; Policy Gradient Search provides a practical algorithm to achieve this. However, Policy Gradient Search lacks an explicit exploration mechanism, which is a key feature of tree-based online search algorithms. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective online search algorithm called Exploratory Policy Gradient Search (ExPoSe), which leverages information sharing among states by updating the search policy parameters directly, while incorporating a well-defined exploration mechanism during the online search process. We evaluate ExPoSe on a range of decision-making problems, including Atari games, Sokoban, and Hamiltonian cycle search in sparse graphs. The results demonstrate that ExPoSe consistently outperforms other popular online search algorithms across all domains. The ExPoSe source code is available at \textit{\url{https://github.com/dixantmittal/ExPoSe}}.
abstract_zh: 基于树的在线搜索算法迭代地模拟轨迹并更新存储在树结构中的一组状态的动作值。它在实践中工作得相当好，但未能有效利用从类似状态收集的信息。根据动作-价值函数的平滑度，克服这个问题的一种方法是通过在线学习，其中信息在相似的状态之间进行插值；策略梯度搜索提供了一种实用的算法来实现这一目标。然而，策略梯度搜索缺乏明确的探索机制，而这是基于树的在线搜索算法的一个关键特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的在线搜索算法，称为探索性策略梯度搜索（ExPoSe），该算法通过直接更新搜索策略参数来利用状态之间的信息共享，同时在在线搜索过程中结合明确定义的探索机制。我们在一系列决策问题上评估 ExPoSe，包括 Atari 游戏、Sokoban 和稀疏图中的哈密顿循环搜索。结果表明，ExPoSe 在所有领域始终优于其他流行的在线搜索算法。 ExPoSe 源代码可在 \textit{\url{https://github.com/dixantmittal/ExPoSe}} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ExPoSe的在线搜索算法，结合了基于状态的探索与基于梯度的在线搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有的在线树搜索算法在利用相似状态的信息方面存在不足，而策略梯度搜索虽能进行在线学习，但缺乏明确的探索机制。
AI.method: ExPoSe通过直接更新搜索策略参数，实现状态间的信息共享，并在在线搜索过程中引入明确的探索机制。
AI.result: ExPoSe在多个决策问题（如Atari游戏、Sokoban和稀疏图的哈密顿循环搜索）中表现优于其他流行在线搜索算法。
AI.conclusion: ExPoSe有效结合了状态信息共享和探索机制，在多种任务中表现出色，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yoshihide Sawada,Keigo Nakamura
title: Concept Bottleneck Model with Additional Unsupervised Concepts
title_zh: 具有附加无监督概念的概念瓶颈模型
abstract: With the increasing demands for accountability, interpretability is becoming an essential capability for real-world AI applications. However, most methods utilize post-hoc approaches rather than training the interpretable model. In this article, we propose a novel interpretable model based on the concept bottleneck model (CBM). CBM uses concept labels to train an intermediate layer as the additional visible layer. However, because the number of concept labels restricts the dimension of this layer, it is difficult to obtain high accuracy with a small number of labels. To address this issue, we integrate supervised concepts with unsupervised ones trained with self-explaining neural networks (SENNs). By seamlessly training these two types of concepts while reducing the amount of computation, we can obtain both supervised and unsupervised concepts simultaneously, even for large-sized images. We refer to the proposed model as the concept bottleneck model with additional unsupervised concepts (CBM-AUC). We experimentally confirmed that the proposed model outperformed CBM and SENN. We also visualized the saliency map of each concept and confirmed that it was consistent with the semantic meanings.
summary: With the increasing demands for accountability, interpretability is becoming an essential capability for real-world AI applications. However, most methods utilize post-hoc approaches rather than training the interpretable model. In this article, we propose a novel interpretable model based on the concept bottleneck model (CBM). CBM uses concept labels to train an intermediate layer as the additional visible layer. However, because the number of concept labels restricts the dimension of this layer, it is difficult to obtain high accuracy with a small number of labels. To address this issue, we integrate supervised concepts with unsupervised ones trained with self-explaining neural networks (SENNs). By seamlessly training these two types of concepts while reducing the amount of computation, we can obtain both supervised and unsupervised concepts simultaneously, even for large-sized images. We refer to the proposed model as the concept bottleneck model with additional unsupervised concepts (CBM-AUC). We experimentally confirmed that the proposed model outperformed CBM and SENN. We also visualized the saliency map of each concept and confirmed that it was consistent with the semantic meanings.
abstract_zh: 随着对问责制的需求不断增加，可解释性正成为现实世界人工智能应用程序的一项基本功能。然而，大多数方法利用事后方法而不是训练可解释模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于概念瓶颈模型（CBM）的新型可解释模型。 CBM 使用概念标签来训练中间层作为附加可见层。然而，由于概念标签的数量限制了该层的维度，因此很难用少量标签获得高精度。为了解决这个问题，我们将监督概念与使用自解释神经网络（SENN）训练的无监督概念相结合。通过无缝训练这两类概念，同时减少计算量，我们可以同时获得有监督和无监督的概念，即使对于大尺寸图像也是如此。我们将所提出的模型称为具有附加无监督概念的概念瓶颈模型（CBM-AUC）。我们通过实验证实所提出的模型优于 CBM 和 SENN。我们还可视化了每个概念的显着性图并确认其与语义含义一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合监督与无监督概念的概念瓶颈模型（CBM-AUC），以提升模型可解释性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法依赖事后解释，而概念瓶颈模型（CBM）因概念标签数量限制导致准确率不足，需引入无监督概念补充。
AI.method: 整合监督概念与自解释神经网络（SENNs）训练的无监督概念，同步训练以减少计算量并适用于大尺寸图像。
AI.result: 实验表明CBM-AUC在性能上优于CBM和SENN，且概念显著性图与语义一致。
AI.conclusion: CBM-AUC通过结合监督与无监督概念，有效提升了模型性能与可解释性，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Xinye Chen,Stefan Güttel
title: Fast and explainable clustering based on sorting
title_zh: 基于排序的快速且可解释的聚类
abstract: We introduce a fast and explainable clustering method called CLASSIX. It consists of two phases, namely a greedy aggregation phase of the sorted data into groups of nearby data points, followed by the merging of groups into clusters. The algorithm is controlled by two scalar parameters, namely a distance parameter for the aggregation and another parameter controlling the minimal cluster size. Extensive experiments are conducted to give a comprehensive evaluation of the clustering performance on synthetic and real-world datasets, with various cluster shapes and low to high feature dimensionality. Our experiments demonstrate that CLASSIX competes with state-of-the-art clustering algorithms. The algorithm has linear space complexity and achieves near linear time complexity on a wide range of problems. Its inherent simplicity allows for the generation of intuitive explanations of the computed clusters.
summary: We introduce a fast and explainable clustering method called CLASSIX. It consists of two phases, namely a greedy aggregation phase of the sorted data into groups of nearby data points, followed by the merging of groups into clusters. The algorithm is controlled by two scalar parameters, namely a distance parameter for the aggregation and another parameter controlling the minimal cluster size. Extensive experiments are conducted to give a comprehensive evaluation of the clustering performance on synthetic and real-world datasets, with various cluster shapes and low to high feature dimensionality. Our experiments demonstrate that CLASSIX competes with state-of-the-art clustering algorithms. The algorithm has linear space complexity and achieves near linear time complexity on a wide range of problems. Its inherent simplicity allows for the generation of intuitive explanations of the computed clusters.
abstract_zh: 我们引入一种快速且可解释的聚类方法，称为 CLASSIX。它由两个阶段组成，即将排序后的数据贪婪聚合为附近数据点组，然后将组合并为簇。该算法由两个标量参数控制，即用于聚合的距离参数和控制最小簇大小的另一个参数。进行了大量的实验，以对合成数据集和真实数据集上的聚类性能进行综合评估，这些数据集具有各种聚类形状和从低到高的特征维度。我们的实验证明 CLASSIX 可以与最先进的聚类算法竞争。该算法具有线性空间复杂度，并在广泛的问题上实现了接近线性的时间复杂度。其固有的简单性允许生成计算集群的直观解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CLASSIX的快速且可解释的聚类方法，通过排序数据的贪心聚合与分组合并实现高效聚类。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类算法在处理大规模数据时存在效率低或可解释性差的问题，需设计兼顾速度与可解释性的新方法。
AI.method: CLASSIX分两阶段运行：首先按排序数据贪心聚合为邻近点组，再合并组为聚类，由距离参数与最小聚类大小参数控制。
AI.result: 实验表明CLASSIX在合成及真实数据集上性能接近最优算法，具备线性空间复杂度和近线性时间复杂度，并能生成直观解释。
AI.conclusion: CLASSIX通过简单设计实现了高效可解释的聚类，为大规模数据分析提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Tong Bu,Jianhao Ding,Zhaofei Yu,Tiejun Huang
title: Optimized Potential Initialization for Low-latency Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 低延迟尖峰神经网络的优化电位初始化
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have been attached great importance due to the distinctive properties of low power consumption, biological plausibility, and adversarial robustness. The most effective way to train deep SNNs is through ANN-to-SNN conversion, which have yielded the best performance in deep network structure and large-scale datasets. However, there is a trade-off between accuracy and latency. In order to achieve high precision as original ANNs, a long simulation time is needed to match the firing rate of a spiking neuron with the activation value of an analog neuron, which impedes the practical application of SNN. In this paper, we aim to achieve high-performance converted SNNs with extremely low latency (fewer than 32 time-steps). We start by theoretically analyzing ANN-to-SNN conversion and show that scaling the thresholds does play a similar role as weight normalization. Instead of introducing constraints that facilitate ANN-to-SNN conversion at the cost of model capacity, we applied a more direct way by optimizing the initial membrane potential to reduce the conversion loss in each layer. Besides, we demonstrate that optimal initialization of membrane potentials can implement expected error-free ANN-to-SNN conversion. We evaluate our algorithm on the CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets and achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, using fewer time-steps. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 93.38\% on CIFAR-10 with 16 time-steps. Moreover, our method can be applied to other ANN-SNN conversion methodologies and remarkably promote performance when the time-steps is small.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have been attached great importance due to the distinctive properties of low power consumption, biological plausibility, and adversarial robustness. The most effective way to train deep SNNs is through ANN-to-SNN conversion, which have yielded the best performance in deep network structure and large-scale datasets. However, there is a trade-off between accuracy and latency. In order to achieve high precision as original ANNs, a long simulation time is needed to match the firing rate of a spiking neuron with the activation value of an analog neuron, which impedes the practical application of SNN. In this paper, we aim to achieve high-performance converted SNNs with extremely low latency (fewer than 32 time-steps). We start by theoretically analyzing ANN-to-SNN conversion and show that scaling the thresholds does play a similar role as weight normalization. Instead of introducing constraints that facilitate ANN-to-SNN conversion at the cost of model capacity, we applied a more direct way by optimizing the initial membrane potential to reduce the conversion loss in each layer. Besides, we demonstrate that optimal initialization of membrane potentials can implement expected error-free ANN-to-SNN conversion. We evaluate our algorithm on the CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets and achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, using fewer time-steps. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 93.38\% on CIFAR-10 with 16 time-steps. Moreover, our method can be applied to other ANN-SNN conversion methodologies and remarkably promote performance when the time-steps is small.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于具有低功耗、生物合理性和对抗鲁棒性等独特特性而受到高度重视。训练深度 SNN 最有效的方法是通过 ANN 到 SNN 的转换，这在深度网络结构和大规模数据集上产生了最佳性能。然而，准确性和延迟之间需要权衡。为了达到原始人工神经网络的高精度，需要很长的模拟时间来匹配尖峰神经元的放电率和模拟神经元的激活值，这阻碍了SNN的实际应用。在本文中，我们的目标是实现具有极低延迟（少于 32 个时间步）的高性能转换 SNN。我们首先从理论上分析 ANN 到 SNN 的转换，并表明缩放阈值确实起到与权重归一化类似的作用。我们没有引入以模型容量为代价促进 ANN 到 SNN 转换的约束，而是采用了更直接的方法，通过优化初始膜电位来减少每层的转换损失。此外，我们证明膜电位的最佳初始化可以实现预期的无差错 ANN 到 SNN 转换。我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集上评估我们的算法，并使用更少的时间步长实现最先进的精度。例如，我们在 CIFAR-10 上以 16 个时间步达到了 93.38% 的 top-1 准确率。此外，我们的方法可以应用于其他 ANN-SNN 转换方法，并在时间步长较小时显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化膜电位初始化的方法，以实现低延迟的高精度脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换。
AI.motivation: ANN到SNN的转换存在精度与延迟的权衡，高精度需要长时间模拟以匹配神经元放电率，导致实际应用受限。
AI.method: 通过理论分析揭示阈值缩放与权重归一化的相似性，直接优化各层膜电位初始值以减少转换损失，实现无误差转换。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10等数据集上以16个时间步达到93.38%的Top-1精度，显著优于现有方法且适用于其他转换框架。
AI.conclusion: 优化初始膜电位可有效解决ANN-SNN转换中的精度-延迟矛盾，为低延迟SNN应用提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种优化膜电位初始化的方法，以实现低延迟的高精度脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换。
motivation: ANN到SNN的转换存在精度与延迟的权衡，高精度需要长时间模拟以匹配神经元放电率，导致实际应用受限。
method: 通过理论分析揭示阈值缩放与权重归一化的相似性，直接优化各层膜电位初始值以减少转换损失，实现无误差转换。
result: 在CIFAR-10等数据集上以16个时间步达到93.38%的Top-1精度，显著优于现有方法且适用于其他转换框架。
conclusion: 优化初始膜电位可有效解决ANN-SNN转换中的精度-延迟矛盾，为低延迟SNN应用提供新思路。
search_text: Optimized Potential Initialization for Low-latency Spiking Neural Networks 低延迟尖峰神经网络的优化电位初始化 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have been attached great importance due to the distinctive properties of low power consumption, biological plausibility, and adversarial robustness. The most effective way to train deep SNNs is through ANN-to-SNN conversion, which have yielded the best performance in deep network structure and large-scale datasets. However, there is a trade-off between accuracy and latency. In order to achieve high precision as original ANNs, a long simulation time is needed to match the firing rate of a spiking neuron with the activation value of an analog neuron, which impedes the practical application of SNN. In this paper, we aim to achieve high-performance converted SNNs with extremely low latency (fewer than 32 time-steps). We start by theoretically analyzing ANN-to-SNN conversion and show that scaling the thresholds does play a similar role as weight normalization. Instead of introducing constraints that facilitate ANN-to-SNN conversion at the cost of model capacity, we applied a more direct way by optimizing the initial membrane potential to reduce the conversion loss in each layer. Besides, we demonstrate that optimal initialization of membrane potentials can implement expected error-free ANN-to-SNN conversion. We evaluate our algorithm on the CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets and achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, using fewer time-steps. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 93.38\% on CIFAR-10 with 16 time-steps. Moreover, our method can be applied to other ANN-SNN conversion methodologies and remarkably promote performance when the time-steps is small. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于具有低功耗、生物合理性和对抗鲁棒性等独特特性而受到高度重视。训练深度 SNN 最有效的方法是通过 ANN 到 SNN 的转换，这在深度网络结构和大规模数据集上产生了最佳性能。然而，准确性和延迟之间需要权衡。为了达到原始人工神经网络的高精度，需要很长的模拟时间来匹配尖峰神经元的放电率和模拟神经元的激活值，这阻碍了SNN的实际应用。在本文中，我们的目标是实现具有极低延迟（少于 32 个时间步）的高性能转换 SNN。我们首先从理论上分析 ANN 到 SNN 的转换，并表明缩放阈值确实起到与权重归一化类似的作用。我们没有引入以模型容量为代价促进 ANN 到 SNN 转换的约束，而是采用了更直接的方法，通过优化初始膜电位来减少每层的转换损失。此外，我们证明膜电位的最佳初始化可以实现预期的无差错 ANN 到 SNN 转换。我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集上评估我们的算法，并使用更少的时间步长实现最先进的精度。例如，我们在 CIFAR-10 上以 16 个时间步达到了 93.38% 的 top-1 准确率。此外，我们的方法可以应用于其他 ANN-SNN 转换方法，并在时间步长较小时显着提高性能。 本文提出了一种优化膜电位初始化的方法，以实现低延迟的高精度脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换。 Tong Bu,Jianhao Ding,Zhaofei Yu,Tiejun Huang cs.NE,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziyue Piao,Gus Xia
title: Sensing the Breath: A Multimodal Singing Tutoring Interface with Breath Guidance
title_zh: 感知呼吸：具有呼吸指导的多模式歌唱辅导界面
comment: New Interfaces for Musical Expression 2022 Demo Paper
comments: New Interfaces for Musical Expression 2022 Demo Paper
abstract: Breath is a significant component in singing performance, which is still underresearched in most singing-related music interfaces. In this paper, we present a multimodal system that detects the learner's singing pitch and breathing states and provides real-time visual tutoring feedback. Specifically, the breath detector is a wearable belt with pressure sensors and flexible fabric. It monitors real-time body movement of the abdomen, back waist, and twin ribs. A breath visualization algorithm is developed to display real-time breath states, together with the singing pitch contours on an interactive score interface. User studies show that our system can help users not only gain deeper breath during singing but also improve pitch accuracy in vocal training, especially for those with some musical background.
summary: Breath is a significant component in singing performance, which is still underresearched in most singing-related music interfaces. In this paper, we present a multimodal system that detects the learner's singing pitch and breathing states and provides real-time visual tutoring feedback. Specifically, the breath detector is a wearable belt with pressure sensors and flexible fabric. It monitors real-time body movement of the abdomen, back waist, and twin ribs. A breath visualization algorithm is developed to display real-time breath states, together with the singing pitch contours on an interactive score interface. User studies show that our system can help users not only gain deeper breath during singing but also improve pitch accuracy in vocal training, especially for those with some musical background.
abstract_zh: 呼吸是歌唱表演的重要组成部分，在大多数与歌唱相关的音乐界面中，呼吸仍然没有得到充分研究。在本文中，我们提出了一个多模态系统，可以检测学习者的歌唱音调和呼吸状态并提供实时视觉辅导反馈。具体来说，呼吸检测器是一条带有压力传感器和柔性织物的可穿戴腰带。它监测腹部、后腰和双肋骨的实时身体运动。开发了一种呼吸可视化算法，用于在交互式乐谱界面上显示实时呼吸状态以及歌唱音高轮廓。用户研究表明，我们的系统不仅可以帮助用户在唱歌时获得更深的呼吸，还可以提高声乐训练中的音高准确性，特别是对于那些有一定音乐背景的用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合呼吸检测的多模态歌唱教学系统，通过实时反馈提升演唱表现。
AI.motivation: 现有歌唱教学界面忽视呼吸训练，而呼吸控制对歌唱表现至关重要，需开发针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计可穿戴压力传感器腰带监测腹部/腰部/肋骨运动，结合可视化算法与互动乐谱界面实时反馈呼吸与音高状态。
AI.result: 用户实验表明系统可增强呼吸深度并提高音准准确性，尤其对有音乐基础者效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了呼吸指导在歌唱教学中的有效性，为音乐教育提供新工具与方法论支持。

authors_text: Baichuan Huang,Teng Guo,Abdeslam Boularias,Jingjin Yu
title: Interleaving Monte Carlo Tree Search and Self-Supervised Learning for Object Retrieval in Clutter
title_zh: 交织蒙特卡罗树搜索和自监督学习用于杂波中的对象检索
abstract: In this study, working with the task of object retrieval in clutter, we have developed a robot learning framework in which Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is first applied to enable a Deep Neural Network (DNN) to learn the intricate interactions between a robot arm and a complex scene containing many objects, allowing the DNN to partially clone the behavior of MCTS. In turn, the trained DNN is integrated into MCTS to help guide its search effort. We call this approach learning-guided Monte Carlo tree search for Object REtrieval (MORE), which delivers significant computational efficiency gains and added solution optimality. MORE is a self-supervised robotics framework/pipeline capable of working in the real world that successfully embodies the System 2 to System 1 learning philosophy proposed by Kahneman, where learned knowledge, used properly, can help greatly speed up a time-consuming decision process over time. Videos and supplementary material can be found at https://github.com/arc-l/more
summary: In this study, working with the task of object retrieval in clutter, we have developed a robot learning framework in which Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is first applied to enable a Deep Neural Network (DNN) to learn the intricate interactions between a robot arm and a complex scene containing many objects, allowing the DNN to partially clone the behavior of MCTS. In turn, the trained DNN is integrated into MCTS to help guide its search effort. We call this approach learning-guided Monte Carlo tree search for Object REtrieval (MORE), which delivers significant computational efficiency gains and added solution optimality. MORE is a self-supervised robotics framework/pipeline capable of working in the real world that successfully embodies the System 2 to System 1 learning philosophy proposed by Kahneman, where learned knowledge, used properly, can help greatly speed up a time-consuming decision process over time. Videos and supplementary material can be found at https://github.com/arc-l/more
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，针对杂乱中的对象检索任务，我们开发了一个机器人学习框架，其中首先应用蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）来使深度神经网络（DNN）能够学习机器人手臂和包含许多对象的复杂场景之间复杂的交互，从而使DNN能够部分克隆MCTS的行为。反过来，经过训练的 DNN 会集成到 MCTS 中，以帮助指导其搜索工作。我们将这种方法称为学习引导的蒙特卡罗树搜索对象检索 (MORE)，它可以显着提高计算效率并增加解决方案的最优性。 MORE 是一个能够在现实世界中工作的自监督机器人框架/管道，成功体现了 Kahneman 提出的从系统 2 到系统 1 的学习理念，其中所学到的知识，如果正确使用，可以帮助大大加快耗时的决策过程。视频和补充材料可以在 https://github.com/arc-l/more 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与自监督学习的机器人框架MORE，用于解决杂乱场景中的物体检索问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂场景中物体检索效率低且依赖标注数据，而MCTS计算开销大，需通过自监督学习提升决策效率并减少人工标注依赖。
AI.method: 通过交替使用MCTS与深度神经网络（DNN），使DNN学习机械臂与复杂场景的交互规律，再将训练后的DNN反馈至MCTS以指导搜索，形成闭环优化。
AI.result: MORE方法在计算效率和解决方案最优性上显著提升，成功应用于现实场景，并验证了系统2到系统1学习理念的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MORE框架通过融合MCTS与自监督学习，实现了高效可靠的物体检索，为机器人自主决策提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ryan Zelek,Hyeran Jeon
title: Characterization of Semantic Segmentation Models on Mobile Platforms for Self-Navigation in Disaster-Struck Zones
title_zh: 灾区自导航移动平台语义分割模型的表征
abstract: The role of unmanned vehicles for searching and localizing the victims in disaster impacted areas such as earthquake-struck zones is getting more important. Self-navigation on an earthquake zone has a unique challenge of detecting irregularly shaped obstacles such as road cracks, debris on the streets, and water puddles. In this paper, we characterize a number of state-of-the-art FCN models on mobile embedded platforms for self-navigation at these sites containing extremely irregular obstacles. We evaluate the models in terms of accuracy, performance, and energy efficiency. We present a few optimizations for our designed vision system. Lastly, we discuss the trade-offs of these models for a couple of mobile platforms that can each perform self-navigation. To enable vehicles to safely navigate earthquake-struck zones, we compiled a new annotated image database of various earthquake impacted regions that is different than traditional road damage databases. We train our database with a number of state-of-the-art semantic segmentation models in order to identify obstacles unique to earthquake-struck zones. Based on the statistics and tradeoffs, an optimal CNN model is selected for the mobile vehicular platforms, which we apply to both low-power and extremely low-power configurations of our design. To our best knowledge, this is the first study that identifies unique challenges and discusses the accuracy, performance, and energy impact of edge-based self-navigation mobile vehicles for earthquake-struck zones. Our proposed database and trained models are publicly available.
summary: The role of unmanned vehicles for searching and localizing the victims in disaster impacted areas such as earthquake-struck zones is getting more important. Self-navigation on an earthquake zone has a unique challenge of detecting irregularly shaped obstacles such as road cracks, debris on the streets, and water puddles. In this paper, we characterize a number of state-of-the-art FCN models on mobile embedded platforms for self-navigation at these sites containing extremely irregular obstacles. We evaluate the models in terms of accuracy, performance, and energy efficiency. We present a few optimizations for our designed vision system. Lastly, we discuss the trade-offs of these models for a couple of mobile platforms that can each perform self-navigation. To enable vehicles to safely navigate earthquake-struck zones, we compiled a new annotated image database of various earthquake impacted regions that is different than traditional road damage databases. We train our database with a number of state-of-the-art semantic segmentation models in order to identify obstacles unique to earthquake-struck zones. Based on the statistics and tradeoffs, an optimal CNN model is selected for the mobile vehicular platforms, which we apply to both low-power and extremely low-power configurations of our design. To our best knowledge, this is the first study that identifies unique challenges and discusses the accuracy, performance, and energy impact of edge-based self-navigation mobile vehicles for earthquake-struck zones. Our proposed database and trained models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 无人驾驶车辆在地震等受灾地区搜索和定位受害者的作用变得越来越重要。地震区的自我导航面临着独特的挑战，即检测道路裂缝、街道上的碎片和水坑等不规则形状的障碍物。在本文中，我们描述了移动嵌入式平台上的许多最先进的 FCN 模型，用于在这些包含极其不规则障碍物的地点进行自导航。我们从准确性、性能和能源效率方面评估模型。我们对我们设计的视觉系统进行了一些优化。最后，我们讨论了这些模型对于几个可以执行自我导航的移动平台的权衡。为了使车辆能够安全地在地震灾区行驶，我们编制了一个新的各种地震灾区的带注释图像数据库，该数据库不同于传统的道路损坏数据库。我们使用许多最先进的语义分割模型来训练我们的数据库，以识别地震灾区特有的障碍物。根据统计和权衡，为移动车辆平台选择最佳的 CNN 模型，并将其应用于我们设计的低功耗和极低功耗配置。据我们所知，这是第一项确定独特挑战并讨论地震灾区基于边缘的自导航移动车辆的准确性、性能和能源影响的研究。我们提出的数据库和经过训练的模型是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在灾难区域（如地震灾区）中，如何在移动平台上优化语义分割模型以实现无人车的自主导航，重点解决不规则障碍物检测问题。
AI.motivation: 地震等灾难区域存在大量不规则障碍物（如裂缝、碎片、积水），传统模型和数据库难以适应，需针对特殊场景优化移动平台的视觉系统和模型性能。
AI.method: 评估多种FCN语义分割模型在移动嵌入式平台的准确性、性能及能效；构建新型地震灾区障碍物标注数据库；提出视觉系统优化方案，并选择适合低功耗/极低功耗设备的CNN模型。
AI.result: 确定了适用于不同移动平台的最优CNN模型，公开了新型数据库和训练模型，首次系统分析了边缘计算设备在灾难区域自主导航的性能与能效权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文为地震灾区无人车自主导航提供了针对性的模型优化方案和数据资源，推动了边缘计算设备在灾难响应场景中的实际应用。
